product.title: Collagen - 60 capsules
product.description:
This supplement combines multiple collagen types from two scientifically proven ingredients, responsibly harvested fish and eggshell membranes.

Most collagen products are messy powders or shots filled with unnecessary ingredients, while practical formats often require several capsules daily. Vitalized introduces a clean formula that gives you all the collage benefits in just two handy capsules daily, without sweeteners, flavors, colors, and only acacia fiber as a natural filler. Collagen includes zinc and a highly absorbable vitamin C for additional support.

product.title: Spermidine & Resveratrol - 30 capsules
product.description:
Spermidine & Resveratrol delivers a powerful duo of popular, complementary longevity nutrients. Spermidine and resveratrol are found in varying amounts across different plant foods. These complementary ingredients have been widely studied for their impact on cellular processes and active aging.

Vitalized’s formula delivers 3 mg spermidine from soybean extract and a scientifically proven dose of 150 mg pure, premium quality Veri-te™ resveratrol per daily serving. Formulated especially for adults 40+, Spermidine & Resveratrol can support those who are taking proactive steps in their longevity journey.

product.title: Iron+ - 90 capsules
product.description: Iron is essential for your energy and immune health. Thanks to cutting-edge microencapsulation, Iron+ 15 mg brings you highly tolerable, stable, and bioavailable iron. In addition, the formula includes three micronutrients to maximize the effect. While vitamin C is well known for boosting iron absorption, research also highlights that vitamin B2, and copper are important for optimal iron metabolism and can improve the benefits of iron supplementation.

product.title: SAMe+ - 60 capsules
product.description:
SAMe (S-adenosyl-methionine) is a multitasker in your body and a key player in your metabolism. It helps produce brain chemicals, antioxidants, and cartilage. SAMe can also be found in food, but you can’t get enough from diet alone.

This exciting formula delivers superior-quality SAMe (Adonat®) and is enriched with vitamins B6, B12, folic acid, and vitamin C to maximize SAMe’s (metabolism and) effectiveness.

product.title: B12 (adenosyl/hydroxy) - 90 capsules
product.description:
Active vitamin B12 formula

B12 (Adenosyl/Hydroxy) provides 2000 µg of vitamin B12 as a blend of ‘active’ forms. Adenosylcobalamin is an activated form of vitamin B12. Hydroxycobalamin is a precursor form of vitamin B12 that is converted in the body to both methylcobalamin and adenosylcobalamin. Adenosylcobalamin and hydroxycobalamin have independent and unique biological functions. Vitamin B12 contributes to normal functioning of the nervous system and psychological function. Vitamin B12 contributes to normal energy-yielding metabolism and the reduction of tiredness and fatigue.

Bromelain has a long history of clinical use and has been subject to scientific research.

product.title: Ester-C® & Flavonoids - 90 capsules
product.description: Ester-C® & flavonoids offers a blend of Ester-C® and flavonoid compounds to provide vitamin C support for healthy immune and cellular function as well as blood vessel integrity. Ester-C®, consisting primarily of calcium ascorbate, is a natural, nonacidic water-soluble form of vitamin C that is distinguished by its unique biological activity. In a double-blind, placebo-controlled, crossover trial, Ester-C supplementation resulted in significantly higher white blood cell vitamin C concentrations compared to standard ascorbic acid at 8 hours and remained elevated at 24 hours. The bioflavonoids quercetin and rutin are free radical scavengers that complement the roles of vitamin C. Quercetin helps maintain healthy mast cell function and moderate healthy leukotriene and prostaglandin metabolism. Preclinical data show that rutin supports blood vessel integrity and healthy cell function.

Each scoop provides 2 g which is a dose consistent with clinical use and not easily achievable with capsules. Highly soluble, pleasant tasting, pure and additive-free inositol that mixes well into water for convenient use.

BioGlute™ proprietary blend of glutathione and phosphatidylcholine with natural liposome formation due to the hydrophobic and hydrophilic nature of phospholipids. Liposomal form protects glutathione from degradation that can occur during digestion. Setria® Glutathione is a bioavailable and in its biologically active reduced form.

product.title: PureDefense - 30 capsules
product.description:
With Vitamin C, D and Zinc for normal function of the immune system

PureDefense is a targeted blend of nutrients and plant extracts including Vitamin C, D and Zinc which contribute to the normal function of the immune system. Also providing n-acetylcysteine (NAC), EpiCor® dried yeast fermentate complex, Elderberry fruit extract and quercetin. Featuring 450 mg of NAC in each serving of two capsules. EpiCor® is a dried yeast fermentate complex that has undergone published clinical research. Provides 1000 IU (25 µg) vitamin D3 in each serving of two capsules.

product.title: L-Arginine - 90 capsules
product.description:
High quality l-arginine

l-Arginine provides high quality l-arginine as a highly bioavailable free-form amino acid. l-Arginine is the precursor to nitric oxide (NO), which has a wide range of metabolic functions. l-Arginine has been subject to a great deal of clinical research. Each serving of two vegetarian capsules provides 1400 mg of l-arginine.

product.title: Folic Acid - 60 capsules
product.description:
Folate for preconception and pregnancy care

Folic Acid provides 800 µg of folic acid in each vegetarian capsule. Supplemental folic acid intake increases maternal folate status. Low maternal folate status is a risk factor in the development of neural tube defects in the developing foetus. Folic acid also contributes to normal psychological function and the reduction of tiredness and fatigue.

product.title: Resveratrol Extra - 60 capsules

Resveratrol EXTRA combines resveratrol with polyphenols from red wine and grape seed. Features 100 mg trans resveratrol per capsule. The trans-isomer of resveratrol is considered superior to the cis isomer. Grape seed extract and red wine provide additional polyphenols.

product.title: Potassium Magnesium (citrate) - 180 capsules

Potassium Magnesium (citrate) provides potassium and magnesium absorbed and alkaline citrates. Potassium contributes to the maintenance of normal blood pressure. Magnesium contributes to normal functioning of the nervous system and the reduction of tiredness and fatigue.

product.title: Niacitol 500 MG - 60 capsules
product.description:
Well-tolerated, no-flush niacin

Niacitol® contains inositol nicotinate, a form of no-flush niacin (vitamin B3). Niacitol is well tolerated and unlikely to cause flushing of the skin, a common side-effect of niacin. Inositol nicotinate is composed of one molecule of inositol and six molecules of niacin. Niacin contributes to normal nervous system and psychological function. Niacin contributes to normal energy-yielding metabolism.

product.title: Vitamin D3 Vegan 2,000 IU - 120 capsules
product.description:

Mineral and trace element formula

Iron contributes to normal formation of red blood cells and haemoglobin. Zinc contributes to the normal functioning of the immune system. And magnesium contributes to normal functioning of the nervous system and the reduction of tiredness and fatigue.

product.title: PureDefense - 120 capsules

product.title: Zinc 15 - 60 capsules

High absorption zinc picolinate

product.title: Phytosterol Complex - 90 capsules

Product features:

product.title: Poly-ProFlora Powder - 138 g powder
product.description:

product.title: Apple Pectin 500 mg - 180 Tablets
product.description:
Apple Pectin
contains 500 mg of apple pectin from fresh apples. It is a natural fiber that can also serve as a prebiotic. Prebiotics are indigestible fibers that serve as food for probiotics. This makes the number of active bacteria larger and stronger. As a result, they have a better chance of survival in our digestive system.
Hint:
Food supplements are not intended to be a substitute for a balanced and varied diet.

product.title: Ultra Source of Life®- 180 mini-Tablets
product.description: Ultra Source of Life® with Lutein is a broad-spectrum micronutrient matrix delivered in an easily swallowed mini-tablet format. It combines highly bioavailable essential vitamins and minerals with a robust complex of amino acids, whole-food extracts, and fatty acids. This advanced biochemical formulation ensures the optimal cellular delivery of foundational nutrients, including naturally occurring lutein and cholecalciferol (Vitamin D3), to support systemic physiological pathways.

product.title: Designs for Beauty Hit the Lights™ - 120 mL liquid
product.description: Hit the Lights™ is a vitamin C soluble liquid to brighten and even skin tone from the inside out. It promotes antioxidant activity, collagen synthesis, and normal tissue healing, and offers some protection against the damaging effects of environmental factors. Utilizing a unique liposomal delivery system, Hit the Lights™ delivers soluble vitamin C for enhanced absorption and delivery into the body’s cells, including those in the skin.

product.title: Designs for Beauty The Big Glow™ - 60 capsules
product.description:
Our skin, hair, and nails change as we get older, less strength, moisture, elasticity, and radiance. These changes can also happen
because of exposure to sunlight, pollution, and other toxins. Luckily, newer research shows that keratin and specific vitamins and
botanicals found in The Big Glow™ act as key building blocks to help promote the normal repair the cells of your hair, skin, and
nails. The ingredients in The Big Glow™ help promote optimal skin elasticity, hydration, and appearance, collagen production, nail
strength, and hair thickness to help you glow from the inside out.

product.title: Designs for Beauty Balance Her Out™ - 120 capsules
product.description: Balance Her Out™ is a unique formula that contains extensively studied nutrients and herbs that have been shown to support female hormonal balance and healthy estrogen metabolism. Hormonal balance can play an important role in hair and skin vitality, elasticity, hydration, and radiance. It can influence hair follicle health and function and skin oil production, cellular health, and inflammatory responses. This formula harnesses the power of diindolylmethane (DIM), black cohosh, chaste tree extract, chrysin, and calcium D‐glucarate to promote healthy sex hormone balance and detoxification and antioxidant status, which are key factors in promoting luxurious hair and radiant skin.

product.title: Designs for Beauty The Capital E™ - 60 softgels
product.description:
Revitalize your skin with The Capital E™, a revolutionary product from Designs for Beauty formulated with vitamin E tocotrienols
sourced from the annatto tree. This product is designed to promote skin hydration, along with supporting the skin’s antioxidant
status, healthy inflammatory responses, and normal healing process. Unlike typical vitamin E products high in tocopherol forms of
vitamin E, our formula is 100% tocotrienol forms of vitamin E, supporting optimal benefits for glowing, nourished skin - inside and
out. Experience the added benefit of potential protection against external environmental stressors with The Capital E™.

product.title: Designs for Beauty Clear the Chaos™ - 180 capsules
product.description:
Clear the Chaos™ provides comprehensive support for healthy skin clarity by focusing on the body’s natural repair and regeneration
processes and overall skin health. This product features skin supportive nutrients, vitamins, and minerals that work together to
target the underlying factors that may worsen the appearance of the skin, such as disruptions to healthy inflammatory responses,
blood glucose and fat metabolism, and immune balance. In doing so, this formula may help promote clear and vibrant skin.

product.title: Designs for Sport Hydration Packs - 14 sachets
product.description: Designs for Sport® Hydration Packs are a great‑tasting, clementine-flavored electrolyte drink mix with a full spectrum of electrolytes, D‑ribose, and vitamin C to support hydration and electrolyte balance. Achieving cellular hydration is crucial for optimal performance and recovery, and water alone isn’t enough. Designs for Sport® Hydration Packs offer a balanced 1:1 potassium to sodium ratio to enhance muscle function, along with D-ribose and Vitamin C for muscle recovery. This zero-sugar, low-carb powder provides twice the electrolytes of leading brands (nine times more than the leading sports drink) and comes in convenient stick packs for easy mixing on the go.

product.title: Designs for Beauty Beyond Brilliance™ - 180 g powder
product.description: Beyond Brilliance™ is a convenient, biotin-rich collagen powder that uniquely combines key nutrients for radiant hair, skin, and nails. It features hydrolyzed collagen peptides and Lustriva®, a patented, clinically researched blend of stabilized biotin and silica. Evidence suggests that Lustriva® may help promote hair fullness, optimal skin texture and hydration, and nail strength. This unflavored and unsweetened powder is optimal for mixing with liquids to help you shine and sustain from the inside-out.

product.title: Designs for Beauty The Foundation of You™ - 120 capsules
product.description: The Foundation of You™ provides support for foundational health and radiant hair, skin, and nails. It is a strategically formulated multivitamin/multimineral specifically designed to mimic the nutrient intakes found in human evolutionary-type diets. It features bio-identically sourced vitamins and minerals, plus phytonutrients from fruit and vegetable extracts, which can complement any type of diet. These nutrients synergistically promote healthy skin complexion, the body's normal tissue repair processes, nail strength, and hair follicle health. They may also promote antioxidant status and support healthy skin during the aging process.

product.title: Designs for Beauty Perfect Equilibrium™ - 60 capsules
product.description:
In the past, people often enjoyed fermented foods like yogurt and sauerkraut to keep their gut healthy. Plus, they consumed much
higher amounts of plant foods and less processed foods, which promoted higher fiber intake and supported a healthy gut
microbiome. Nowadays, these foods aren’t as common in the standard American diet. That’s where Perfect Equilibrium™ comes in.
Perfect Equilibrium™ is a unique kind of probiotic supplement designed to strengthen the connection between your gut and skin. By
promoting a healthy balance of good bacteria in your gut, it can support radiant, healthy looking skin. Perfect Equilibrium ™
contains spore-based probiotics, which act like armor for the good bacteria, shielding them from the harsh conditions of your
stomach. These probiotics can safely reach your intestines intact, where they become active and promote your gut, skin, and
overall health

product.title: Designs for Beauty Calm the Storm™ - 60 softgels
product.description:
Soothe and balance your skin with Calm the Storm™, a powerful, highly-concentrated omega-3 fatty acids formula. Omega-3s are
a type of fat that help keep your skin hydrated, support normal healing processes, and promote healthy inflammatory responses, all
of which are important for radiant-looking skin. Omega-3s may also help protect the skin from external environmental stressors and
support normal oil production in the skin, which may support those with occasional blemishes. Since our bodies can’t make
omega-3s on their own, Calm the Storm™ is ideal for giving your skin the long-term support it needs with enhanced bioavailability
and absorption.

product.title: Designs for Sport Amino Complex Fruit Punch - 360 g powder
product.description: Amino Complex is a balanced amino acid formula available in two delicious flavors orange and fruit punch. This powder provides essential amino acids in their free form, making them immediately available for absorption. This allows them to be used metabolically much more easily and quickly than the amino acids contained in dietary proteins. Alpha-ketoglutarate and vitamin B6 (as pyridoxal-5-phosphate) are included for optimal absorption and effectiveness. Amino Complex contains zero grams of sugar and is sweetened with stevia.

product.title: Designs for Sport Amino Complex Orange - 360 g powder
product.description: Amino Complex is a balanced amino acid formula available in two delicious flavors orange and fruit punch. This powder provides essential amino acids in their free form, making them immediately available for absorption. This allows them to be used metabolically much more easily and quickly than the amino acids contained in dietary proteins. Alpha-ketoglutarate and vitamin B6 (as pyridoxal-5-phosphate) are included for optimal absorption and effectiveness. Amino Complex contains zero grams of sugar and is sweetened with stevia.

product.title: Designs for Sport GPC Liquid - 59 mL
product.description: GPC Liquid is a water soluble molecule that has been proven to be more effective than Phosphatidylcholine (PC) from diet or supplementation. GPC liquid helps fat transport in and out of cells, Improves memory, mental focus and reaction time in elderly and young individuals, boosts growth hormone production in the young and elderly and Increases fat oxidation, muscle strength and reaction time, potentially improving balance.* So whether you are in the gym or in the classroom, GPC Liquid is your go to brain supplement.

product.title: Designs for Sport Curcumin Complex - 60 softgels
product.description: Curcumin Complex is a highly bioavailable curcuminoid formulation. It contains a unique combination of three bioactive, health-promoting curcuminoids: curcumin, bisdemethoxy curcumin and demethoxy curcumin, along with turmeric oil. The three curcuminoids are the best researched constituents of the turmeric root. Curcumin Complex is manufactured utilizing the Designs for Sport Evail™ process, which helps to enhance the bioavailability and absorption of bioactive ingredients. This proprietary process uses a quillaja extract, along with delta- and gamma-tocotrienols and medium-chain triglycerides (MCTs) to support absorption.

product.title: Designs for Sport Creatine Monohydrate - 450 g powder
product.description: This formula contains a highly stable and bioavailable form of creatine monohydrate to support athletic performance, skeletal muscle, and body composition. Creatine Monohydrate is an amino acid that promotes stamina and recovery for ideal lean body mass during training. Creatine generates the body's energy currency, as adenosine triphosphate (ATP), for the muscles and metabolism, and our bodies have a limited capacity to produce creatine on their own.

product.title: Designs for Sport Collagen Complex™ - 390 g powder
product.description: Collagen Complex™ contains a unique blend of three patented collagen peptides supported by clinical research showing their efficiency for supporting collagen production, bone strength, joint health and integrity, skin elasticity and more. Collagen is a special type of protein that accounts for as much as 30% of the body’s total protein. In particular, it’s a primary structural component of connective tissue. The amino acid composition of dietary collagens are very similar to those in human collagens, making dietary collagen peptides ideal for supporting normal body collagen turnover and renewal.

product.title: Designs for Sport Hydrolyzed ISO-Whey Protein - 819 g
product.description:
Hydrolyzed ISO-Whey Protein is a great tasting protein powder with unique benefits beyond the standard whey protein and available in delicious Chocolate flavor.

With a combination of whey protein concentrate, whey protein isolate and hydrolyzed whey protein isolate, Hydrolyzed ISO-Whey Protein is a biologically active protein that contains all the amino acids in an optimal balance, including the essential amino acids, with rapid digestibility for faster absorption.

product.title: Designs for Sport Hydration Complex - 240 g powder
product.description: Hydration Complex is a complete and balanced electrolyte formula to help promote optimal hydration, especially after excessive sweating. It contains potassium, sodium, chloride and magnesium, the main electrolytes found in the body. Athletes need more than water to maintain optimal hydration, supplement your excess sweating and sauna use with Hydration Complex. Add Hydration Complex to your routine and see the difference proper hydration can make in your performance.

product.title: Designs for Sport Grass-Fed Beef Protein Vanilla - 810 g powder
product.description: Grass-Fed Beef Protein is a delicious protein featuring HydroBEEFTM, a highly concentrated beef protein sourced from animals raised in Sweden without hormones, and fed a diet entirely free of GMO grains, grasses, hay, and/or ensilage. The protein is produced through an exclusive hydrolysis and ultra-ﬁltration process that enables the protein to be hydrolyzed or ‘split’ into a high concentration of functional peptides. Delivering protein in the form of peptides allows for easier absorption and assimilation. Beef Protein is the perfect choice for those looking to increase their protein intake. It is free of sucrose, fructose, and artiﬁcial sweeteners, and is sweetened with stevia leaf extract.

product.title: Designs for Sport Grass-Fed Beef Protein Chocolate - 810 g powder
product.description: Grass-Fed Beef Protein is a delicious protein featuring HydroBEEFTM, a highly concentrated beef protein sourced from animals raised in Sweden without hormones, and fed a diet entirely free of GMO grains, grasses, hay, and/or ensilage. The protein is produced through an exclusive hydrolysis and ultra-ﬁltration process that enables the protein to be hydrolyzed or ‘split’ into a high concentration of functional peptides. Delivering protein in the form of peptides allows for easier absorption and assimilation. Beef Protein is the perfect choice for those looking to increase their protein intake. It is free of sucrose, fructose, and artiﬁcial sweeteners, and is sweetened with stevia leaf extract.

product.title: Designs for Sport Neuromag™ Sport - 90 capsules
product.description: Neuromag™ Sport formerly Neuro Complex features the unique, patented, chelated mineral Magtein®, which contains magnesium that is chelated to threonic acid (magnesium L-threonate). This highly bioavailable form of magnesium is formulated to promote brain concentrations of magnesium. Magnesium L-threonate is an ionophore, which has the ability to transport magnesium ions across lipid membranes, including those of brain cells. Magtein® is superior to other forms of magnesium at entering through the blood-brain barrier.* This product is designed to support cognitive function, memory, and overall brain health.

product.title: Designs for Sport Multi + Phyto - 120 capsules
product.description: "Multi + Phyto™ is a first-of-its-kind multivitamin, mineral and phytonutrient blend specifically formulated to mimic the nutrient intakes found in an optimal evolutionary human diet. The levels of nutrients provided by Multi + Phyto™ were devised based on the concept of evolutionary adaptation of human physiology and correspond to a whole food, nutrient-dense diet with ingredients that have been sourced to be naturally occurring or bioidentical. In addition to key vitamins and minerals, this formula includes select phytonutrients proven to have beneficial effects (such as lutein, lycopene, resveratrol, wild blueberry, broccoli seed/sprout, citrus bioflavonoids and more), which were likely consumed in greater quantities in the evolutionary past than they are in the modern diet.

product.title: Designs for Sport Mito NRG™ - 120 capsules
product.description: Mito NRG™ is a formulary blend of nutrients, nutraceuticals, botanicals, and Krebs cycle intermediates designed to support efficient mitochondrial metabolism and energy (ATP) production for increased vitality. Mito NRG™ was designed to support the function of the mitochondria, “the powerhouse of the cell.” This formula may be appropriate for anyone wishing to promote overall cellular and tissue vitality and health, including those wanting to increase energy output for athletic performance.

product.title: Designs for Sport Magnesium Bisglycinate - 120 capsules
product.description: Magnesium Bisglycinate contains highly absorbable magnesium with each capsule providing 150 mg of elemental magnesium. This product should not cause any of the unfavorable gastrointestinal (GI) symptoms associated with magnesium supplementation due to the very stable chelate formed between two glycine molecules and each magnesium ion via a patented process.

product.title: Designs for Sport L-Glutamine Powder - 500 g
product.description: Glutamine powder supplies the amino acid L-glutamine, which is important for the health of the immune system and the digestive tract. In the gut it promotes the health and function of the mucosal cells for the body's normal repair processes. L-Glutamine also supports optimal muscle growth and strength and has been shown to be particularly useful in helping to maintain muscle tissue, as it can be used as a substrate for protein synthesis and an anabolic precursor for muscle growth.

product.title: Designs for Sport Hydrolyzed ISO-Whey Protein Chocolate - 819 g powder
product.description:
Hydrolyzed ISO-Whey Protein is a great tasting protein powder with unique benefits beyond the standard whey protein and available in delicious Chocolate flavor.
With a combination of whey protein concentrate, whey protein isolate and hydrolyzed whey protein isolate, Hydrolyzed ISO-Whey Protein is a biologically active protein that contains all the amino acids in an optimal balance, including the essential amino acids, with rapid digestibility for faster absorption.

product.title: Designs for Sport Pro-Formance Peptides™ - 120 capsules
product.description: Pro-Formance Peptides™ is specifically designed for athletes or fitness enthusiasts to support overall muscle homeostasis (including muscle growth, endurance, retention, and recovery). It features PeptiStrong™, plant-based bioactive peptides from the fava bean (Vicia faba) that act on certain pathways in the body that stimulate muscle protein synthesis – discovered through state-of-the-art lab testing and AI machine learning. This product may help promote athletic performance, help retain healthy lean body mass, help promote faster recovery, and support normal exercise-induced inflammatory responses. Pro-Formance Peptides™ provides a potent, plant-based solution to help you train harder and recover faster, while maintaining optimal muscle health. Plus, it is NSF Certified for Sport®.

product.title: Designs for Sport Probiotic 50 - 30 capsules
product.description: Probiotic 50 is a highly potent, shelf-stable, dairy-free probiotic that delivers 50 billion CFUs from 10 clinically researched commensal strains per capsule. DFS Probiotic 50 delivers more than 2.5x the CFUs per serving of other sports nutrition probiotics.+Designed to support serious training and performance goals, Probiotic 50 promotes gut health, immune function, and athletic recovery. It helps maintain a balanced microbiome, a healthy inflammatory response, and supports nutrient absorption — key for endurance, strength, and overall performance. Probiotic 50 may also help relieve occasional GI complaints common in athletes. Whether training hard or competing, this probiotic helps athletes stay resilient from the inside out.

product.title: Designs for Sport Power Pack - 30 packs
product.description: Upgrade your vitamin routine with Designs for Sport™ Power Pack - the cornerstone for any serious athlete’s supplement stack. Build a stronger foundation with convenient all-in-one packets developed to cover all the critical nutritional gaps that may affect any athlete’s performance. Each packet contains: 1 x Magnesium Bisglycinate, 1 X Vitamin D3 Pro Softgel, 2 x Omega-3 Hi-Po and 2 x Multi + Phyto.

product.title: Designs for Sport Omega 3 Hi-Po - 60 softgels
product.description: Omega 3 HI-PO provides a potent 1600 mg of omega-3 fatty acids, 800 mg each of EPA and DHA per 2-softgel serving, without the fishy after taste. In line with our bioidentical nutritional philosophy, all of our fish oils are a natural triglyceride (TG) form in order to more closely mimic that which is found in nature. EPA and DHA are found naturally in fish in this triglyceride form. This is not your average fish oil pill, the Omega 3 HI-PO formula is the most bioavailable form of fish oil, bringing the good fat to your cells.

product.title: Designs for Sport Sleep Complex - 60 capsules
product.description:
Sleep Complex capsules is a blend of botanicals, nutrients, and neurotransmitter precursors designed to support quality, restful sleep. By providing nutritional support for calm brain activity, Sleep Complex helps promote the body’s natural ability to fall asleep and stay asleep.

Key ingredients include botanicals that support nervous system function, PharmaGABA® (a proprietary form of GABA), L-theanine, melatonin, 5-HTP, and pyridoxal-5- phospate (activated form of vitamin B6).

product.title: Iodoral® 50 mg - 90 tablets
product.description: Iodoral® 50 mg is a high-potency, standardized tablet form of Lugol solution, providing a precise ratio of elemental iodine and potassium iodide. This formulation is designed to provide high-dose iodine in a non-volatile, stable format that avoids the gastric irritation and metallic taste common with liquid preparations. Iodine is an essential trace element that acts as a primary precursor for thyroid hormone synthesis, contributing to normal energy-yielding metabolism, cognitive function, and the maintenance of the nervous system. The Micosolle® delivery system ensures the stability of these halides, supporting physiological requirements and mineral balance.

product.title: Iodoral® 12.5 mg - 180 tablets
product.description: Iodoral® is a high-potency tablet form of Lugol solution, specifically engineered to provide a precisely quantified ratio of elemental iodine and potassium iodide. This formulation ensures the delivery of essential halides in a stable, non-volatile format that avoids the gastric irritation and metallic aftertaste often associated with liquid solutions. As a critical precursor for the synthesis of thyroid hormones (T3 and T4), iodine contributes to normal energy-yielding metabolism, cognitive function, and the maintenance of the nervous system. The inclusion of the Micosolle® blend enhances the delivery of these trace elements, mimicking the intake levels found in traditional seaweed-rich diets to support systemic physiological balance

product.title: Vitamin D3 Complete 5000 - 120 softgels
product.description: Vitamin D3 Complete 5000 provides a high-potency, synergistic blend of essential fat-soluble vitamins. Formulated with 5000 IU (125 mcg) of cholecalciferol, this supplement strategically pairs Vitamin D3 with Vitamin A (as retinyl palmitate) and Vitamin K2 (as menaquinone-7) to support physiological balance and normal calcium utilization. The inclusion of DeltaGOLD® tocotrienols provides a pure form of the vitamin E family. Delivered in a lipid base of safflower oil, these fat-soluble nutrients ensure optimal bioavailability and assimilation.

product.title: Vitamin D3 Complete - 120 softgels
product.description: Vitamin D3 Complete is a synergistic formulation that delivers a balanced ratio of essential fat-soluble vitamins, including 2000 IU of cholecalciferol (Vitamin D3) and 900 mcg RAE of retinyl palmitate (Vitamin A). The formula is further enriched with highly bioavailable menaquinone-7 (Vitamin K2) and DeltaGOLD® tocotrienols. This specific biochemical combination is designed to support the optimal utilization and physiological balance of these interdependent fat-soluble nutrients.

product.title: L-Tyrosine - 120 capsules
product.description: Designs for Health L-Tyrosine delivers 1.2 g of the conditionally essential amino acid L-tyrosine alongside 100 mg of ascorbic acid per serving. This targeted formulation utilizes a highly bioavailable, free-form amino acid structure to ensure optimal gastrointestinal absorption and rapid cellular uptake. Ascorbic acid is strategically integrated as an essential enzymatic cofactor to facilitate the efficient biochemical conversion of tyrosine.

product.title: L-Glutamine - 120 capsules
product.description: L-Glutamine Capsules deliver the conditionally essential amino acid L-glutamine in its highly bioavailable, free-form state for rapid systemic absorption. As the most abundant free amino acid in human plasma, it serves as a primary biochemical substrate for tissues requiring rapid cellular turnover. This precise formulation provides an unadulterated, stable dose to support foundational intracellular amino acid pools.

product.title: PrebioMed™ XOS - 60 capsules
product.description: PrebioMed™ XOS is an advanced synbiotic formulation combining specific probiotic strains with highly bioactive xylooligosaccharides (XOS). This dairy-free, vegan complex is engineered to selectively stimulate beneficial microbial growth at lower inclusion rates, optimizing intestinal tolerability. The molecular structure of XOS ensures precise delivery to the lower gastrointestinal tract, supporting robust microbial proliferation without the typical gastric degradation.

product.title: PhytoTick Defense - 120 capsules
product.description: Developed by Darin Ingels, ND, and Allergy Research Group®. A blend of mushrooms, herbs, and beta glucan to support healthy microbial balance and immune response.

product.title: Mitochondrial Cofactors - 90 capsules
product.description: This advanced formulation provides a synergistic blend of specific metabolic cofactors, including Acetyl-L-Carnitine, Alpha-Lipoic Acid, and Coenzyme Q10, designed to support physiological cellular bioenergetics. These biomolecules function as essential chemical precursors and electron carriers within the mitochondrial matrix, directly facilitating the synthesis of adenosine triphosphate (ATP). The highly bioavailable forms utilized in this complex ensure optimal intracellular delivery and systemic distribution to high-energy-demand tissues.

product.title: Herxheimer Support* - 60 capsules
product.description: This specialized formulation combines essential mineral bicarbonates with advanced botanical extracts to support physiological homeostasis during periods of increased metabolic demand. It features CurcuWIN®, a highly bioavailable form of turmeric extract, alongside Boswellia serrata resin. The strategic inclusion of sodium and potassium in their bicarbonate forms provides fundamental chemical substrates necessary for supporting normal acid-base metabolism within the body.

product.title: Mastica® - 240 capsules
product.description: This specialized botanical formulation delivers authentic Chios mastic gum, a natural resin extracted from the Pistacia lentiscus var. Chia tree. It provides a complex matrix of bioactive phenolic compounds and triterpenes recognized for their physiological stability. This naturally occurring resinous complex offers a highly tolerated, functional approach to supporting mucosal integrity and systemic oxidative balance.

product.title: S-Acetyl Glutathione - 60 tablets
product.description: This high-potency formulation delivers 300 mg of S-Acetyl-L-Glutathione, an advanced, highly bioavailable form of the endogenous tripeptide. The addition of an acetyl group protects the glutathione molecule from rapid enzymatic degradation in the gastrointestinal tract, ensuring efficient absorption and direct delivery to the cytosol and mitochondria. Once intracellular, it is converted into active reduced glutathione (GSH), a critical molecule for maintaining physiological cellular homeostasis.

product.title: Aller-Aid™ L-92® - 60 capsules
product.description: Aller-Aid™ L-92® is an advanced formulation combining a specialized postbiotic strain, Lactobacillus acidophilus L-92®, with synergistic botanicals and essential nutrients. This heat-treated postbiotic technology offers stable, reliable cell-wall components that interact with the gastrointestinal immune matrix, supporting normal immune function without the need for live bacterial colonization. The addition of Vitamin C contributes to the normal function of the immune system and the protection of cells from oxidative stress. It is further complemented by Boswellia serrata extract (standardized to 65% boswellic acid) and the flavonoid luteolin, creating a comprehensive profile for systemic physiological support.

product.title: Vitamin D3 Complete 5000 - 60 softgels
product.description: Vitamin D3 Complete 5000 is a high-potency, fat-soluble vitamin complex designed to deliver synergistic physiological support. By combining a concentrated dose of Cholecalciferol (Vitamin D3) with Retinyl Palmitate (Vitamin A), this formula ensures the proper balance of these critical nutrients, which interact closely in cellular receptor signaling. The addition of Menaquinone-7 (Vitamin K2) facilitates proper calcium utilization, contributing to the maintenance of normal bones, while DeltaGOLD® tocotrienols provide a specialized form of vitamin E to support cellular protection against oxidative stress. Encapsulated in a vegetarian softgel within a safflower oil base, this supplement optimizes the bioavailability of its fat-soluble constituents.

product.title: Vitamin D3 Complete - 60 softgels
product.description: Vitamin D3 Complete is a comprehensive fat-soluble vitamin complex specifically formulated to support physiological balance and nutrient synergy. It delivers Cholecalciferol (Vitamin D3) alongside Retinyl Palmitate (Vitamin A) to ensure optimal metabolic harmony, as these vitamins closely interact in cellular receptor signaling. The inclusion of Menaquinone-7 (Vitamin K2) directs proper calcium utilization for the maintenance of normal bones, while DeltaGOLD® tocotrienols provide a specialized form of the vitamin E family to support cellular protection from oxidative stress. Encapsulated in a vegetarian softgel with safflower oil, this formula enhances the bioavailability of these essential fat-soluble nutrients.

product.title: Acetyl-Glutathione 100 mg - 60 tablets
product.description: This formulation delivers S-Acetyl-L-Glutathione, a highly stable and bioavailable form of the endogenous tripeptide glutathione. The addition of an acetyl group protects the glutathione molecule from rapid enzymatic degradation in the gastrointestinal tract, allowing it to efficiently reach the cytosol and mitochondria. Once intracellularly absorbed, it is converted into active reduced glutathione (GSH). Functioning as a primary intracellular antioxidant and crucial cofactor, glutathione plays an essential physiological role in neutralizing reactive oxygen species, supporting mitochondrial energy metabolism, and facilitating phase II detoxification pathways in the liver and kidneys.

product.title: Nattokinase 50mg - 300 capsules
product.description: Nattokinase NSK-SD® provides a specialized, standardized systemic enzyme derived from the natural fermentation of non-GMO soybeans utilizing a specific strain of Bacillus subtilis natto. As a potent proteolytic enzyme, nattokinase participates in the body's natural fibrinolytic processes and physiological protein metabolism. This highly purified formulation is specifically engineered to deliver consistent enzymatic activity while being entirely free of vitamin K2, ensuring precise and reliable supplementation. Encapsulated in vegetarian capsules, it offers a clean, highly bioavailable format to complement metabolic and systemic enzymatic functions.

product.title: GI Flora Dairy Free - 90 capsules
product.description: This specialized probiotic formulation delivers a synergistic blend of four well-researched, lyophilized bacterial strains designed to support the physiological balance of the intestinal microbiome. By providing a combination of Lactobacillus and Bifidobacterium species alongside fructooligosaccharides (FOS)—a prebiotic fiber that serves as a metabolic substrate for beneficial bacteria—this supplement facilitates optimal gastrointestinal flora colonization. The advanced freeze-drying process ensures the structural stability and cellular viability of these microorganisms, contributing to the maintenance of normal digestive and mucosal function.

product.title: Laktoferrin with Colostrum - 90 capsules
product.description: This specialized formulation combines bovine lactoferrin with ethically sourced, first-milking colostrum to provide a concentrated source of bioactive proteins. Lactoferrin is a multifunctional iron-binding glycoprotein naturally found in secretory fluids, playing a key role in systemic iron homeostasis and physiological immune support. The inclusion of bovine colostrum provides a rich matrix of naturally occurring immunoglobulins (IgG), lactoperoxidase, and growth factors. Processed at low temperatures to maintain the structural integrity and biological activity of these delicate proteins, this supplement offers a high-purity approach to supporting the body’s innate physiological defenses and mucosal health.

product.title: Coenzyme Q10 50 mg - 75 capsules
product.description: This formulation provides high-purity Coenzyme Q10 (CoQ10) in the form of ubiquinone, a vital fat-soluble quinone found in nearly every cellular membrane. CoQ10 serves as a critical electron carrier within the mitochondrial electron transport chain, facilitating the synthesis of adenosine triphosphate (ATP), the body's primary energy currency. By acting as a key component in cellular bioenergetics, this supplement supports physiological functions in high-energy-demand tissues. The vegetarian-friendly capsules ensure a clean delivery of this essential nutrient, derived through a natural fermentation process for optimal purity.

product.title: Acetyl-L-Carnitine 500mg - 100 capsules
product.description: This formulation features Acetyl-L-Carnitine (ALC), a highly bioavailable acetylated ester of the amino acid L-carnitine. Functioning as a critical metabolic precursor, ALC facilitates the transport of long-chain fatty acids into the mitochondrial matrix for beta-oxidation and energy production. Its unique molecular structure allows it to cross the blood-brain barrier effectively, providing an acetyl group for the synthesis of acetylcholine, a primary neurotransmitter. This pharmaceutical-grade supplement is designed to support cellular energy metabolism and maintain physiological neurological function through high-purity ingredient delivery.

product.title: ATP Cofactors™ - 90 tablets
product.description: Optimox® ATP Cofactors™ is a high-potency, targeted B-vitamin complex designed to support robust cellular energy production. It provides clinical doses of essential biochemical precursors, delivering 100 mg of riboflavin (vitamin B2) and 500 mg of niacin (vitamin B3) formulated as inositol hexanicotinate. This specific formulation leverages a "flush-free" form of niacin to consistently supply the crucial enzymatic cofactors necessary for optimal mitochondrial function.

product.title: Flashes No More® - 60 capsules
product.description: Flashes No More® is a targeted botanical and mineral complex formulated to support physiological balance and overall well-being during the menopausal transition. The formula features highly bioavailable magnesium succinate combined with clinically studied, patented plant extracts, including EstroG-100® and Lifenol® female hops cone extract. These synergistic ingredients are standardized for active biochemical compounds, such as oligomeric proanthocyanidins (OPCs), ensuring consistent quality and cellular support.

product.title: MethylPro® Magnesium Glycinate - 90 capsules
product.description: This formulation delivers 125 mg of magnesium in the highly bioavailable form of magnesium bisglycinate, synergistically combined with vitamin C. Utilizing a chelated form—where magnesium is bound to the amino acid glycine—ensures optimal gastrointestinal tolerance and superior systemic absorption. It is a gentle, stomach-friendly supplement designed to support nervous system function, muscle relaxation, and overall metabolic efficiency.

product.title: MethylPro® L-Theanine 200mg - 90 capsules

The use of a pure, free-form amino acid ensures high systemic bioavailability and predictable physiological responses.

Combining activated B-vitamins and chelated minerals, it also supports neurotransmitter balance, cardiovascular health, and overall wellness. L-methylfolate is an important methyl donor, whereas other B-vitamins support the entire methylation cycle and act as critical co-enzymes.

product.title: GluDaZyme™ - 60 capsules
product.description: GluDaZyme™ is a comprehensive enzymatic complex designed to support the physiological digestion of macronutrients, with a specific focus on complex proteins. The formulation utilizes a proprietary blend of proteolytic enzymes featuring Dipeptidyl Peptidase IV (DPP-IV) activity. Biochemically, DPP-IV is capable of cleaving proline-rich peptide bonds, such as those found in gluten (gliadin) and casein proteins, facilitating their breakdown into smaller peptides and amino acids. This matrix is complemented by a broad spectrum of amylases, lactases, and lipases to support the hydrolysis of carbohydrates, lactose, and dietary fats within the gastrointestinal tract.

product.title: Biomaintenance™ Prebiotic + Fiber - 378 g powder
product.description: This advanced formulation features a diverse matrix of soluble fibers and prebiotics designed to support the intestinal microbiome. The core ingredient is Sunfiber® (Partially Hydrolyzed Guar Gum), a water-soluble galactomannan that regulates intestinal transit and provides a fermentation substrate for beneficial bacteria. It is combined with Inulin, VitaFiber™ (Isomaltooligosaccharides), and PreticX™ (Xylooligosaccharides). Physiologically, these compounds resist digestion in the upper gastrointestinal tract, reaching the colon where they stimulate the growth of Bifidobacteria and Lactobacilli and facilitate the production of Short-Chain Fatty Acids (SCFAs) like butyrate.

product.title: Metabolic Detox Complete Chocolate - 1.05 kg powder
product.description: Metabolic Detox® Complete is a comprehensive, hypoallergenic nutritional formula designed to support physiological metabolic processes. It features a multi-source plant protein blend derived from pea, rice, and hemp, providing 20 grams of protein per serving to support the maintenance of muscle mass and normal bone health. The formula is enriched with a full spectrum of vitamins, minerals, and amino acids that contribute to normal energy-yielding metabolism and the protection of cells from oxidative stress. It also includes specific nutrients to support the body’s natural physiological functions.

product.title: Metabolic Detox Complete Vanilla - 1.05 kg powder
product.description: Metabolic Detox® Complete is a comprehensive, hypoallergenic nutritional formula designed to support physiological metabolic processes. It features a multi-source plant protein blend derived from pea, rice, and hemp, providing 20 grams of protein per serving to support the maintenance of muscle mass and normal bone health. The formula is enriched with a full spectrum of vitamins, minerals, and amino acids that contribute to normal energy-yielding metabolism and the protection of cells from oxidative stress. It also includes specific nutrients to support the body’s natural physiological functions.

product.title: Organic Psyllium Husk Powder - 454 g
product.description:
This product provides pure, certified organic Psyllium Husk Powder derived from the outer coating of the Plantago ovata seed. Psyllium is a rich source of soluble fiber, which has high water-holding capacity. Physiologically, it acts as a bulk-forming agent. Upon hydration, it forms a gelatinous mucilage that increases faecal bulk and facilitates intestinal transit. This contributes to the maintenance of a healthy bowel function and supports normal digestion. The soluble fiber content also aids in maintaining normal blood cholesterol levels.
Certified organic by Oregon Tilth.

product.title: L-Methylfolate 15mg - 60 capsules
product.description: This high-potency formulation delivers 15 mg of L-Methylfolate (5-MTHF), the biologically active, methylated form of folate. Unlike synthetic folic acid, 5-MTHF is directly bioavailable and does not require enzymatic conversion by the MTHFR enzyme, allowing it to cross the blood-brain barrier efficiently. Folate plays a vital physiological role, contributing to normal psychological function, normal amino acid synthesis, and the normal metabolism of homocysteine. It also contributes to the reduction of tiredness and fatigue and the normal function of the immune system.

product.title: L-Methylfolate 2.5mg - 90 capsules
product.description: This formulation delivers Folate in its biologically active form, L-Methylfolate (5-MTHF). Unlike synthetic folic acid, which requires enzymatic conversion by the body, L-Methylfolate is directly bioavailable and can cross the blood-brain barrier. Folate plays a crucial role in numerous physiological functions, including normal psychological function and the normal functioning of the immune system. It also contributes to normal blood formation, amino acid synthesis, and cell division. Furthermore, Folate contributes to normal homocysteine metabolism and the reduction of tiredness and fatigue.

product.title: Vitamin D-3 5,000 IU - 90 capsules
product.description: This high-potency supplement delivers Vitamin D in its most biologically active form, Cholecalciferol (Vitamin D3), which is naturally synthesized by the human body upon exposure to sunlight. Vitamin D is essential for maintaining normal blood calcium levels and facilitates the efficient absorption and utilization of calcium and phosphorus, which are critical for the maintenance of normal bones and teeth. Additionally, Vitamin D plays a significant role in the normal function of the immune system and the process of cell division. This formula is enhanced with Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid) to support product stability and physiological function.

product.title: Magnesium Citrate - 120 capsules
product.description: This supplement provides magnesium in the citrate form, an organic salt recognized for its high bioavailability and excellent intestinal uptake. Magnesium is an essential mineral that acts as a cofactor in more than 300 enzymatic reactions, including those responsible for protein synthesis and energy production. Physiologically, magnesium contributes to normal muscle function, electrolyte balance, and the maintenance of normal bones and teeth. It also plays a vital role in the normal functioning of the nervous system and psychological function. By supporting the reduction of tiredness and fatigue, this highly absorbable form is an ideal choice for maintaining daily mineral balance and metabolic efficiency.

product.title: Potassium Magnesium Citrate - 240 capsules
product.description: This formulation combines two essential minerals, potassium and magnesium, in the highly bioavailable citrate form. Citrates are organic compounds that facilitate the efficient absorption of minerals. Physiologically, potassium contributes to the maintenance of normal blood pressure and the normal functioning of the nervous system. Magnesium works synergistically, contributing to electrolyte balance, normal energy-yielding metabolism, and normal muscle function. This product is designed to support daily mineral requirements with a well-tolerated delivery system.

product.title: Resveratrol with Piperine - 60 capsules
product.description: This formulation delivers 200 mg of Resveratrol, a naturally occurring polyphenolic stilbenoid often found in the skin of red grapes and Japanese Knotweed (Polygonum cuspidatum). Resveratrol is recognized for its biological activity and antioxidant properties, which contribute to the protection of cells from oxidative stress. To overcome the naturally low bioavailability of stilbenoids, this product is fortified with 20 mg of Piperine (derived from Black Pepper). Piperine physiologically enhances the absorption and bioavailability of resveratrol by inhibiting the glucuronidation process in the liver.

product.title: Silymarin 300mg - 180 capsules
product.description: This formulation delivers a potent dose of Silymarin, the active lipophilic flavonolignan complex derived from the seeds of Milk Thistle (Silybum marianum). Each capsule contains 360 mg of Milk Thistle extract, standardized to provide a guaranteed yield of 300 mg of pure silymarin. Physiologically, silymarin functions as a membrane stabilizer and provides significant antioxidant support. It contributes to the protection of the liver and the maintenance of normal hepatic function, while also supporting the liver's physiological detoxifying potential.

product.title: Buffered Vitamin C 1000mg - 180 capsules
product.description: This professional-grade formulation provides 1000 mg of Vitamin C per serving, buffered with calcium and magnesium to create a non-acidic, pH-neutral delivery system. Physiologically, Vitamin C contributes to the protection of cells from oxidative stress and supports the normal function of the immune system. It acts as an essential cofactor for normal collagen formation, which is vital for the health of blood vessels, bones, cartilage, and skin. The addition of citrus bioflavonoids enhances the nutrient profile, supporting physiological synergy. This buffered form is specifically designed for optimal gastrointestinal tolerance, making it suitable for individuals with sensitive digestion.

product.title: Metabolic Detox® Capsules - 60 capsules
product.description: This specialized complex is designed to support normal hepatic function through a synergistic blend of botanicals and sulfur-containing compounds. The formula features Silymarin, a standardized extract from Milk Thistle (Silybum marianum), which contributes to liver protection and supports the liver's physiological detoxifying potential. It is combined with N-Acetyl-L-Cysteine (NAC), a direct precursor for the synthesis of the endogenous antioxidant glutathione, and Alpha Lipoic Acid (ALA), a versatile molecule active in both aqueous and lipid environments. These ingredients provide essential substrates for cellular metabolic pathways.

product.title: Deluxe Scavengers™ - 60 capsules
product.description: Deluxe Scavengers™ is a comprehensive formulation designed to provide a broad spectrum of fat-soluble and water-soluble nutrients. This complex combines high-potency Vitamins A, C, and E, which physiologically contribute to the protection of cells from oxidative stress and support the normal function of the immune system. The formula is enhanced with Coenzyme Q10 (CoQ10), a vital component of the mitochondrial electron transport chain, alongside Setria® L-Glutathione, Pomella® Pomegranate extract, Lutein, and Zeaxanthin. These ingredients work synergistically to support physiological balance.

product.title: CoQ10 100mg - 60 capsules
product.description: This formulation delivers 100 mg of Coenzyme Q10 (CoQ10), a naturally occurring, fat-soluble compound found in the mitochondria of virtually every cell in the human body. Biochemically, CoQ10 serves as an essential electron carrier in the mitochondrial electron transport chain, a fundamental process for the synthesis of adenosine triphosphate (ATP), the primary energy carrier in cells. The product is fortified with Vitamin C (ascorbic acid), which contributes to normal energy-yielding metabolism and the protection of cells from oxidative stress.

product.title: SAMe 200mg - 60 capsules
product.description: This formulation delivers 200 mg of S-Adenosyl-L-Methionine (SAMe), a naturally occurring compound found in every living cell. Biologically, SAMe serves as a critical methyl donor in numerous biochemical reactions, including the synthesis of neurotransmitters such as dopamine, serotonin, and norepinephrine. It also plays a key role in transmethylation reactions essential for the synthesis of phospholipids and the maintenance of cell membrane structure. To ensure stability and efficacy, this product utilizes a specialized form of SAMe stabilized with calcium and is delivered in acid-resistant capsules for targeted intestinal release.

product.title: NAC 600mg - 60 capsules
product.description: This supplement features N-Acetyl-L-Cysteine (NAC), the acetylated and stable derivative of the semi-essential amino acid L-cysteine. Physiologically, NAC acts as a direct metabolic precursor for the synthesis of glutathione, a major endogenous tripeptide and antioxidant found within human cells. It serves as a highly bioavailable source of sulfhydryl groups (-SH), which are essential for various metabolic pathways and structural protein integrity. The formulation is designed to ensure stability and efficient absorption of the active compound.

product.title: L-Tryptophan 500mg - 60 capsules
product.description: This formulation delivers 500 mg of L-Tryptophan, an essential amino acid that must be obtained through the diet. L-Tryptophan serves as a crucial biochemical precursor for the endogenous synthesis of serotonin (5-hydroxytryptamine), melatonin, and niacin (Vitamin B3). To facilitate optimal metabolism, this product includes Vitamin B6 (pyridoxine), which acts as a necessary cofactor in the enzymatic conversion of tryptophan. Vitamin B6 contributes to normal psychological function, the normal functioning of the nervous system, and the reduction of tiredness and fatigue.

product.title: L-Theanine 200mg - 120 capsules
product.description: This formulation features Suntheanine®, a patented and clinically researched form of L-Theanine. L-Theanine is a unique amino acid naturally found in green tea (Camellia sinensis). Structurally similar to glutamate, it is capable of crossing the blood-brain barrier. Physiologically, L-Theanine is known to influence brain activity by increasing the generation of alpha brain waves, which are associated with a state of wakeful relaxation. It also plays a role in the modulation of neurotransmitters, without acting as a sedative. The product is fortified with Glycine to further support physiological function.

product.title: Glycine Powder - 200 g powder
product.description: This product provides 100% pure Glycine in a convenient, easily dissolvable powder form. Glycine is the simplest naturally occurring amino acid, yet it plays a complex physiological role as a fundamental building block for proteins, including collagen. It serves as a necessary precursor for the endogenous synthesis of glutathione, creatine, porphyrins, and purines. In the central nervous system, glycine functions as an inhibitory neurotransmitter. This powder allows for flexible dosing and possesses a naturally sweet taste, making it suitable for mixing into liquids without the need for added sweeteners.

product.title: Glycine 500mg - 240 capsules
product.description: This supplement provides 500 mg of pure L-Glycine per capsule. Glycine is the simplest naturally occurring amino acid and serves as a fundamental building block for structural proteins, particularly collagen and elastin. Physiologically, it acts as a crucial precursor for the endogenous synthesis of glutathione, creatine, porphyrins, and purines. In the central nervous system, glycine functions as an inhibitory neurotransmitter, playing a role in signal transduction. The product utilizes free-form amino acid to facilitate optimal absorption and bioavailability.

product.title: 5 HTP 100mg - 120 capsules
product.description: This specialized formulation features 5-Hydroxytryptophan (5-HTP), a naturally occurring amino acid metabolite derived from the seeds of the Griffonia simplicifolia plant. In the human body, 5-HTP serves as the direct metabolic precursor to serotonin. This product is designed with a synergistic blend of cofactors, including Vitamin B6 (in the active Pyridoxal-5-Phosphate form) and Vitamin C, which contribute to the normal functioning of the nervous system and normal psychological function. The formula is further complemented by the addition of Glycine.

product.title: Bioperine® 10 mg - 90 Capsules
product.description: Bioperine 10 is a double-strength black pepper extract that enhances nutrient absorption and bioavailability.

product.title: WheyCool™ vanilla - 900 g powder
product.description: Whey Cool™ is a great-tasting, high protein, low carbohydrate, functional food powder. It is made with an exceptional quality whey protein made from the milk of cows that graze on pesticide-free, non-GMO grass pastures in New Zealand, which are known to be one of the least polluted environments in the world. The milking cows are never fed grain and are not subjected to hormone or antibiotic treatments. This whey is instantized with sunflower lecithin (non-GMO), which helps it dissolve more easily in water and prevents foaming during blending.

product.title: WheyCool™ chocolate - 900 g powder
product.description: Whey Cool™ is a great-tasting, high protein, low carbohydrate, functional food powder. It is made with an exceptional quality whey protein made from the milk of cows that graze on pesticide-free, non-GMO grass pastures in New Zealand, which are known to be one of the least polluted environments in the world. The milking cows are never fed grain and are not subjected to hormone or antibiotic treatments. This whey is instantized with sunflower lecithin (non-GMO), which helps it dissolve more easily in water and prevents foaming during blending.

product.title: Twice Daily Multi™ - 240 capsules
product.description: Twice Daily Multi™ contains optimal amounts of many nutrients not easily obtained in most diets. It uses higher quality ingredients than most multivitamins, including vitamin E Isomers as DeltaGold® tocotrienols, a highly bioavailable form of folate, and true amino acid chelate minerals for optimal tolerance and absorption. These exceptional ingredients are combined in an up-to-date, science-based formulation to create a truly superior multivitamin.

product.title: Stabilized R-Lipoic Acid Supreme - 60 capsules
product.description: Stabilized R-Lipoic Acid Supreme features a highly bioavailable form of R-lipoic acid (RLA), Bio-Enhanced® RLA. RLA is the form found in nature and the more biologically active enantiomer of lipoic acid that supports antioxidant status in the body and promotes a healthy inflammatory response and glucose metabolism. Stabilized R-Lipoic Acid Supreme also contains the amino acid taurine to support antioxidant status and promote healthy glucose metabolism.

product.title: Q-Evail 100 - 60 softgels
product.description: Q-Evail® 100 offers 100 mg of highly bioavailable ubiquinone, also known as coenzyme Q10 (CoQ10) in easy-to-swallow softgels. CoQ10 may help support physical energy levels, mitochondrial health, and neurological function. Q-Evail® uses Designs for Health’s Evail™ technology that combines quillaja extract and medium-chain triglycerides (MCT) for improved nutrient bioavailability and superior absorption. This product is free of polysorbates, castor oil, and polyoxyethylated chemicals.

product.title: OsteoForce™ - 240 capsules
product.description: OsteoForce™ is a unique blend of highly absorbable vitamins and minerals formulated to support healthy bones. OsteoForce™ features calcium and magnesium that are bound to malic acid for enhanced absorption, along with chelated forms of zinc, copper, and manganese for superior bioavailability. Vitamin D, vitamins K1 and K2 (as MK-4), vitamin E isomers (as DeltaGold® delta- and gamma-tocotrienols), and geranylgeraniol (GG [as GG-Gold®]) are also included to support bone health.

product.title: Phytotein™ vanilla - 510 g powder
product.description: Phytotein™ is a delicious, dairy-free, plant-based protein powder that promotes protein status and nutritional support in the body. It features an organic protein blend primarily composed of organic pea protein with additional protein from organic sunflower, pumpkin seed, sacha inchi, and rice sources. Phytotein™ provides 20 g of protein per 1-scoop serving. This formula is a true vegetarian- and vegan-friendly protein powder that is easily digestible and absorbed in the body and offers a variety of nutritional benefits. Phytotein™ is a pleasant-tasting protein alternative for individuals with allergies or sensitivities to difficult-to-digest proteins, such as egg, whey, casein, and soy, and for those with lactose intolerance. The high-quality pea protein in this formula is nongenetically modified with a neutral taste and a smooth texture, and it is a good source of the amino acid lysine.

product.title: Natto-Serrazime - 120 capsules
product.description: Natto-Serrazime™ is a blend of two health-promoting proteolytic enzymes, Nattozimes® and Serrazimes®, derived from the fungi Aspergillus oryzae and Aspergillus melleus. This formula is designed to support the body’s ability to breakdown and remove damaged cellular debris, tissue, and specific protein structures that are produced during the natural inflammatory process in response to trauma or injury. These proteolytic enzymes may help maintain healthy joints, support healthy circulatory, respiratory, and immune function, and promote a normal inflammatory response.

product.title: MycoSupreme™ - 60 capsules
product.description: MycoSupreme™ makes it easy to get the power of mushrooms every day with a full-spectrum blend of eight mushroom extracts. Mushrooms are a rare and good source of both ergothioneine, a compound that helps support the body’s antioxidant capacity, and beta-glucans, natural fibers that promote immune system balance. MycoSupreme™ combines 1,000 mg of whole mushroom extracts with 15 mg of ergothioneine (as MitoPrime®) and 160 mg of beta-glucans per serving to support healthy immune function and cognitive health, while helping to promote normal energy production. This product offers a simple way to support overall vitality and healthy aging.

product.title: L-5-MTHF - 60 capsules
product.description: This L-5-MTHF formula provides 5 mg (8,500 mcg DFE) of biologically active folate, which is essential for cell division and growth and for proper homocysteine metabolism.* This formula provides folate in the bioidentical, bioactive form, 5-methyltetrahydrofolate (L-5-MTHF). The “L” in L-5-MTHF signifies its all-natural [6S] isomer, which is the active circulating form of folate found in the body and one of the several forms found in food. In nature, it is found only as the [6S] isomer, which is why DFH uses L-5-MTHF (as Quatrefolic®), the natural isomer, rather than the mixed (or racemic) form. This innovative form of folate has demonstrated high bioavailability, solubilitiy, and long-lasting stability. Quatrefolic® L-5-MTHF is superior to folic acid for helping to maintain optimal serum folate.

product.title: Liposomal D Supreme - 50 mL
product.description: Liposomal D Supreme features vitamins D3, K1, and K2 combined to support healthy bones and calcium balance. Vitamin D supports normal calcium absorption, while vitamin K may help direct calcium to the bones for strength. Vitamin D supports immune health by promoting a healthy inflammatory response, which helps the body stay balanced and healthy. Vitamin D promotes normal insulin and glucose metabolism. Liposomal D Supreme is formulated using liposomal technology for superior delivery, absorption, and bioavailability. It is ideal for children and older populations alike who may have swallowing difficulty or who prefer a liquid formula.

product.title: L-Glutamine powder - 250 g
product.description: L-Glutamine Powder supplies the amino acid, L-glutamine, which is essential for the health of the immune system and the digestive tract. In the gut, it promotes the health and function of the mucosal cells for normal healing and repair. L-glutamine also supports optimal muscle growth and strength, and it has been shown to be particularly useful in helping to maintain muscle tissue, as it can be used as a substrate for protein synthesis and an anabolic precursor for muscle growth.

product.title: K+2 Potassium - 120 capsules
product.description: K+2 Potassium is a uniquely formulated potassium product composed of potassium bicarbonate and potassium bound to the amino acid glycine, which gives the product optimum potency, stability, and tolerability. This alkalinizing formula provides nutritional support to help maintain healthy blood pressure already within the normal range.

product.title: Homocysteine Supreme™ - 120 capsules
product.description: Homocysteine Supreme™ features a synergistic blend of nutrients that support healthy homocysteine metabolism. An optimally functioning homocysteine pathway supplies key methyl and sulfur groups needed for overall health and critical biochemical processes, such as detoxification, immune support, cognitive and reproductive function, and cardiovascular health. In addition to trimethylglycine (also known as betaine), this formula contains bioactive forms of B vitamins, including methylated folate (5-methyltetrahydrofolate). This highly absorbable formula may be especially beneficial for individuals with suboptimal B vitamin status or those with genetic variations that affect methylation status.

product.title: H-S-N Radiance™ - 60 capsules
product.description: H-S-N Radiance™ contains a unique blend of nutrients and botanicals to maintain hair, skin, and nail health. This product provides targeted building blocks to support normal cellular repair, collagen production, skin hydration, and antioxidant status. Soluble keratin promotes moisture, strength, and elasticity for hair, skin, and nails. Citrus extract supports radiant skin, antioxidant status, healthy aging, and a normal inflammatory response. Dermaval® is a proprietary blend of nutrient-rich botanicals to help promote collagen integrity and overall skin radiance. Vitamin C, biotin, bamboo extract, and olive fruit extract further support collagen production, healthy cell proliferation, and hair, skin, and nail integrity.

product.title: Foresterol - 90 softgels
product.description: Foresterol™ contains a phytosterol mixture of plant sterols and stanols shown to help maintain normal cholesterol metabolism in the body. This mixture is from the non-GMO tall oil of the coniferous pine tree and mainly consists of four major phytosterols: beta-sitosterol, campesterol (in the free sterol form, not as sterol esters), campestanol, and sitostanol.

product.title: Digestzymes™ - 60 capsules
product.description: Digestzymes™ is comprised of a proprietary blend of digestive enzymes along with betaine hydrochloride (HCl) to support the optimal digestion of proteins, fats, and carbohydrates. This product contains the special protease dipeptidyl peptidase IV (DPPIV), which aids in the breakdown of the peptides gluteomorphin (from gluten) and casomorphin (from casein). Digestzymes™ also includes the enzyme lactase, which helps break down the dairy sugar, lactose. The use of Digestzymes™ before meals may be helpful for patients who experience gas and bloating after eating, occasional constipation, or a feeling of fullness after eating only a small quantity of food.

product.title: CoQnol 100 mg - 60 Softgels
product.description: CoQnol™ 100 features a unique combination of ubiquinol and trans-geranylgeraniol (GG). The GG complements the actions of ubiquinol by enhancing absorption and supporting endogenous CoQ10 synthesis naturally in the body. This formula provides 100 mg of ubiquinol as DuoQuinol™ and 60 mg of trans-geranylgeraniol as GG-Gold® per serving. A patented form of GG is extracted from annatto seeds, along with quillaja extract for enhanced absorption and bioavailability.

product.title: DFH Complete Multi with Copper & Iron - 120 capsules
product.description: DFH Complete Multi™ with Copper and Iron is a full-spectrum multivitamin with Albion-chelated minerals for maximum absorption and bioavailability. This powerhouse multivitamin supplies supportive nutrients not normally found in regular multivitamins, such as delta- and gamma-tocotrienols, trimethylglycine (TMG), and fruit bioflavonoids. This formula also contains mixed carotenoids, a full spectrum of vitamin K forms, and target amounts of B vitamins based on the evolutionary intake of these nutrients, which support healthy cell replication and are higher than Recommended Daily Allowance (RDA) and Reference Daily Intake (RDI) values. This formula is appropriate for teenagers, menstruating females, and those who avoid eating red meat.

product.title: DFH Complete Multi™ Free of Copper & Iron - 120 capsules
product.description: This powerhouse multivitamin provides nutrients not typically found in standard formulas, including vitamin E tocotrienols, trimethylglycine (betaine), and fruit bioflavonoids. It also features methylated folate and B12, chelated minerals, vitamin A as mixed carotenoids and palmitate, a full spectrum of vitamin K forms, and B vitamins at levels based on evolutionary intake.

product.title: Curcum-Evail® 400 - 120 softgels
product.description:
Curcum-Evail® is a highly bioavailable curcuminoid formulation containing three bioactive, extensively researched curcuminoids. This formula delivers 400 mg of curcumin extract powder per 1-softgel serving. Curcumin supports healthy metabolism, cellular function, and healthy cardiovascular and neurological functions. It also supports a healthy response to oxidative stress and a normal inflammatory response within the body.

Designs for Health’s proprietary Evail™ emulsification technology is designed to enhance the bioavailability and absorption of bioactive ingredients. The Evail™ process uses a quillaja extract, along with delta- and gamma-tocotrienols, and medium-chain triglycerides to support absorption.

product.title: Cal/Mag 2:1 - 180 capsules
product.description: Cal/Mag 2:1 offers highly bioavailable chelated forms of calcium and magnesium in the standard 2-to-1 ratio. It has long been understood that these two minerals work synergistically and their benefits are enhanced when taken together.

product.title: Annatto-E® 150 - 60 softgels
product.description:
Annatto-E™ 150 is a unique tocopherol-free, tocotrienols-only product featuring tocotrienols sourced from the annatto tree. Annatto is the richest known source of tocotrienols, containing 100% tocotrienols (90% delta-isomers and 10% gamma-isomers), with no tocopherols.

Annatto-E™ 150 contains 150 mg per softgel of delta- and gamma-tocotrienols. Commercial vitamin E supplements are typically rich in tocopherols and low or absent in tocotrienols; however, tocotrienol fractions have unique beneficial effects across a variety of tissues that make them desirable for supporting many aspects of health.*

Research indicates that tocopherols — especially alpha-tocopherols — may interfere with key clinical effects of tocotrienols, so it may be best to take tocotrienols alone, without tocopherols.

product.title: Annatto-E® 150 - 30 softgels
product.description:
Annatto-E™ 150 is a unique tocopherol-free, tocotrienols-only product featuring tocotrienols sourced from the annatto tree. Annatto is the richest known source of tocotrienols, containing 100% tocotrienols (90% delta-isomers and 10% gamma-isomers), with no tocopherols.

Annatto-E™ 150 contains 150 mg per softgel of delta- and gamma-tocotrienols. Commercial vitamin E supplements are typically rich in tocopherols and low or absent in tocotrienols; however, tocotrienol fractions have unique beneficial effects across a variety of tissues that make them desirable for supporting many aspects of health.

Research indicates that tocopherols — especially alpha-tocopherols — may interfere with key clinical effects of tocotrienols, so it may be best to take tocotrienols alone, without tocopherols.

product.title: Arterosil® HP - 60 capsules
product.description: A unique approach to supporting heart and blood vessel health by featuring a rare green seaweed extract and a synergistic blend of fruits and vegetables.

product.title: Magnesium Glycinate Complex - 60 capsules
product.description: Magnesium Glycinate Complex contains 150 mg of highly absorbable elemental magnesium per capsule. This product should not cause any of the unfavorable gastrointestinal (GI) symptoms associated with magnesium supplementation due to the very stable chelate formed between two glycine molecules and each magnesium ion via a patented process.

product.title: Animal Parade® GOLD Multivitamin Cherry - 60 Lozenges
product.description: What does the Animal Parade® stand for? The Animal Parade series from NaturesPlus consists of a range of products especially for children in cheerful animal shapes and with various delicious flavours. There is a suitable product for almost every child. Children need healthy food to grow, develop well and perform well in school. It is not always easy to provide children with sufficient, balanced and good nutrients. Some children are picky eaters or prefer sweets and pizza to fruits and vegetables. Animal Parade offers the quality that parents expect and the taste that children love. Animal Parade® GOLD Children's Multi provides vitamins and minerals for the daily basic supply. Based on the original Animal Parade formula, it is enhanced with vitamin K2, selenium, chromium, enzymes, probiotics and over 20 whole food concentrates. This product contains 60/120 cherry flavored lozenges. Hint: Food supplements are not intended to be a substitute for a balanced and varied diet.

product.title: Garlite® 500 mg - 90 Capsules
product.description:
What is Garlite®?

Garlite® contains 500 mg capsules with ripe garlic from Allium sativum and does not leave an unpleasant odor.
How is Garlite® made?

NaturesPlus uses GMO-free, ripe garlic for its product, which is processed in a special cool-drying process. As a result, the content of allicin and other valuable ingredients corresponds to that of fresh garlic.

product.title: Red Yeast Rice Sustained Release 600mg - 30 Tablets
product.description:
Red Yeast Rice
Tablets provide 600 mg of a standardized extract of red fermented rice.
Red Yeast Rice, Red Yeast Rice, Red Fermented Rice, or Red Rice Flour is made by making white rice using a red yeast strain (
Monascus purpureus
) is fermented.
This produces certain substances (monacolins) that have an inhibitory effect on the enzyme HMG-CoA reductase, which is involved in the body's own cholesterol synthesis.
Extended release tablets release the active ingredients with a delay of 10-12 hours. This achieves sustainable and up to 40% higher bioavailability. Red yeast rice is a traditional food in e.g. Chinese cuisine.
