product.title: Mixed Vegetables® - 180 Tablets
product.description:
What is Mixed Vegetables®?

Mixed Vegetables® contains leafy greens as well as root and cruciferous vegetables. It is a highly concentrated extract of phytonutrients and provides a balance of naturally occurring nutrients. All ingredients are grown in peak season and carefully prepared to preserve freshness and nutritional value.
Plant sterols

Plant sterols (phytosterols, phytosterols) are secondary plant ingredients. They are mainly found in high-fat parts of plants such as oils, nuts and seeds. Phytosterols have a chemical structure that is very similar to cholesterol and have been shown to lower blood cholesterol levels. High cholesterol is a risk factor for developing coronary artery disease.
Vegetable Supplement

This product from NaturesPlus offers an ideal way to supplement the diet with additional vegetables. Each tablet provides a mixture of 4 vegetables.

product.description:
All-7
provides seven herbs as nutrient support for the respiratory tract.Nature's Plus products are 100% natural. With quality guarantees from independent laboratories.

product.title: Source of Life® Green Lightning® - 180 Capsules
product.description:
Source of Life Green Lightning
provides whole food concentrates and extracts from green superfoods and seaweed such as barley grass, brown rice, spirulina, chlorella and kelp. Source of Life stands for whole food-based multivitamins and dietary supplements. These combine effective dosages of individual vitamins, minerals and other vital substances with wholefood concentrates from original foods. This synergy allows for results that can be felt, which have become known as the Guaranteed Burst of Energy. Source of Life for the Guaranteed Burst of Energy.Nature's Plus products are 100% natural. product.title: Acetyl L-Carnitine - 90 capsules
product.description:
Acetyl L-Carnitine (ALC) is a natural component of our
brain’s chemistry and promotes production of acetylcholine,
the most abundant neurotransmitter in the brain. The body
makes ALC in small amounts, but as we age, levels decline.
ALC is a form of L-carnitine, an amino acid derivative that
helps the body produce energy. However, slightly altering
the chemical structure of this nutrient (adding the “acetyl”
group), helps it work differently in the body to support both
brain health and energy production.*
Brain Health
Acetyl L-Carnitine is structurally similar to acetylcholine
and may help facilitate its production and maintenance
of optimal levels. Acetylcholine is involved in supporting
memory, focus, and learning. It also serves to regulate
activities of vital organs and blood vessels, as well as
communication between nerves and muscles. ALC can help
support the repair of cells in the brain and nervous system
that have been damaged by stress and poor diet.*
Energy Production
L-Carnitine, (not the ALC form) is required to help escort fats into the part of the cell where they
are burned and converted into energy (the mitochondria), thereby supporting energy production
and weight management. Acetyl L-Carnitine works differently. Because the unique “acetyl” molecule
allows this compound to work differently in the body, ALC may support energy production within
brain cells, aiding in mental clarity, focus, and stamina.
Healthy Moods
The neurotransmitter acetylcholine is important for a healthy, balanced mood. Acetyl L-carnitine not
only supports a healthy mood by encouraging normal acetylcholine levels, but also by supporting
energy production and delivery to brain cells. Energized brain cells communicate better with each
other and with the rest of the body, leading to a healthier mood.*
Recommended Use: As a dietary supplement, take one capsule per day, or as directed by your health
care practitioner.

What are bioflavonoids?
Bioflavonoids are a large group of bioactive substances that occur naturally in plants. Fruits, vegetables, herbs, nuts, and seeds are particularly good sources. In the plant itself, these substances are involved in many different important processes, such as growth, protection against UV radiation, and insect repellent. In addition, they are often responsible for the color, smell, and taste of the plants.

product.title: Source of Life® Energy Shake - 1014 gr
Vitamin B12 Herbal Lozenges - 30 Lozenges
product.description:
What is vitamin B12? Vitamin B12 (or cobalamin) is one of the water-soluble vitamins and is part of the B vitamin complex, which consists of eight B vitamins. Vitamin B12 is significantly involved in various metabolic processes in the body, including the breakdown of fatty acids. Its central importance for the metabolism of the vitamin folic acid (folate) also makes it important for blood formation. Other examples include support for homocysteine metabolism, contribution to brain and nerve functions, involvement in memory function, and help in reducing fatigue as well as lethargy. It plays an important role in tissue growth and development, not to mention its positive influence on the immune system.

Vitamin B12 in our food Vitamin B12 is found exclusively in animal foods. Under a strict vegan diet, it is therefore easier to develop a vitamin B12 deficiency. In addition, a vitamin B12 deficiency only becomes noticeable after years. The food richest in vitamin B12 is liver. Other food sources include meat, fish, eggs, and dairy products. Vitamin B12 is only contained in plant-based foods if bacterial fermentation has occurred, but then only in very small quantities (bacterial fermentation/fermentation e.g. sauerkraut) that are not sufficient to cover the recommended intake.

Vitamin B12 Herbal Lozenges Vitamin B12 Herbal Lozenges from NaturesPlus contain extracts of dandelion, sarsaparilla, raspberries, and beetroot in addition to 1,000 mcg of the activated form methylcobalamin. Hint: Food supplements are not intended to be a substitute for a balanced and varied diet.

product.title: Orange Juice 500 mg Vitamin C - 90 Lozenges
product.description:
What is Orange Juice?
Orange Juice contains 500 mg of vitamin C in orange-flavored lozenges.
Vitamin C
Vitamin C has been proven to have a positive effect on many different places and in various processes of our body.
Vitamin C is the most important water-soluble antioxidant and protects our body from free radicals (aggressive substances that can damage tissues and cells). Known causes of this are smoking, stress and an unhealthy diet. Antioxidants render these free radicals harmless and help the body stay healthy.
Vitamin C also contributes to the normal function of the immune system and the nervous system, increases iron absorption and contributes to normal collagen formation as well as to the normal function of blood vessels, cartilage and skin.
Vitamin C in our diet
Since our body cannot synthesize vitamin C on its own, we have to absorb it completely through food.
Vitamin C sources are mainly fruits and vegetables as well as their juices and smoothies. Citrus fruits, kiwis, berries, strawberries and cabbages in particular are rich in vitamin C.

product.title: Ultra Lipoic™ mini tabs - 60 Mini Tablets
product.description:
What is Ultra Lipoic™?
Ultra Lipoic is a formula that consists of R-Lipoic Acid and Alpha-Lipoic™ Acid. Alpha-lipoic acid comes in two different forms (isomers), the R and S forms. The R-shape is the most natural and effective form of the body. However, the S-form can increase the bioavailability of the R-form. Because of this, this supplement contains a mixture of both forms.
In addition, the product offers a patented probiotic complex, as well as a patented complex with MSM (methylsulfonylmethane), NAC (N-acetyl cysteine), turmeric (standardized curcumin), grape seed extract (from Vitis vinifera, standardized proanthocyanidins).

Alpha Lipoic Acid
Alpha-lipoic acid is a sulfur-containing fatty acid that occurs naturally in the mitochondria of all cells in our body. It can be formed in small quantities in our body from the amino acid cysteine and the fatty acid octanoic acid. Alpha-lipoic acid is also found in limited quantities in our food, especially in animal offal, as well as in vegetables and fruits.

Supplement with Alpha Lipoic Acid

product.title: ImmunActin® Zinc Lozenges - 60 lozenges
product.description:
What is zinc?
The essential trace element zinc is involved in many processes in the human organism as a component and activator of numerous enzymes. Thus, it helps in the build-up and breakdown of carbohydrates, fats and protein. It also plays a role in growth, the immune system, sexual development and fertility, as well as the sensation of taste and appetite. Zinc is also involved in the antioxidant protection system against free radicals and also supports the bones. It plays a role in mental exertion and activity, as well as in stressful situations. Since there are only limited zinc stores in the body and these can only be mobilized with difficulty in the event of an undersupply, a continuous supply through food is particularly important.

Zinc in our food
Animal products are the main suppliers of zinc. Good sources include beef, pork, poultry, seafood such as crab or lobster, eggs, milk and cheese. In general, zinc can be better absorbed from animal foods than from plant foods. When it comes to plant-based food sources of zinc, cereal products and nuts are in the foreground.

Zinc as a supplement
ImmunActin® Zinc Lozenges from NaturesPlus provides 10 mg of elemental zinc as zinc aspartate in combination with standardized extracts of echinacea, olive leaves and elderberries per lozenge. One package contains 60 cherry-flavored lozenges.

product.title: Acti-Zyme - 180 Capsules
product.description:
What is Acti-Zyme? Acti-Zyme offers a carefully formulated combination of digestive enzymes. It is specially formulated to help the body digest proteins, carbohydrates, and fats. It also contains FOS (fructooligosaccharides) and probiotics.

What are digestive enzymes? Digestive enzymes are proteins that are involved in breaking down nutrients into smaller building blocks in the body. There are many different digestive enzymes – each with a different function. Acti-Zyme contains amylase, lipase, and lactase, among others. Amylase is an enzyme that allows carbohydrates to break down into individual sugar molecules. Lipase helps the body break down fats, as well as lactase helps break down lactose (milk sugar).

Bioperine This product contains Bioperine from Piper nigrum, which can increase the bioavailability and effects of numerous substances.

Vitamin D is a vitamin that the body can produce on its own. Vitamin D synthesis takes place in the skin with the help of sunlight. That's why vitamin D is also known as the sunshine vitamin.

What are digestive enzymes? Digestive enzymes are proteins that are involved in breaking down nutrients into smaller building blocks in the body. There are many different digestive enzymes – each with a different function. Acti-Zyme contains amylase, lipase, and lactase, among others. Amylase is an enzyme that allows carbohydrates to break down into individual sugar molecules. Lipase helps the body break down fats, as well as lactase helps break down lactose (milk sugar).

Vitamin C Vitamin C has been proven to have a positive effect on many different places and in various processes of our body. Vitamin C is the most important water-soluble antioxidant and protects our body from free radicals (aggressive substances that can damage tissues and cells). Known causes of this are smoking, stress, and an unhealthy diet. Antioxidants render these free radicals harmless and help the body stay healthy. Vitamin C also contributes to the normal function of the immune system and the nervous system, increases iron absorption, and contributes to normal collagen formation as well as to the normal function of blood vessels, cartilage, and skin.

Vitamin C in our diet Since our body cannot synthesize vitamin C on its own, we have to absorb it completely through food. Vitamin C sources are mainly fruits and vegetables as well as their juices and smoothies. Citrus fruits, kiwis, berries, strawberries, and cabbages in particular are rich in vitamin C. Strong and shiny
AgeLoss® Hair Support contains zinc and biotin (vitamin B7). These nutrients are known to contribute to normal hair growth and keep hair strong and shiny. In addition, this product provides the antioxidants vitamin C, riboflavin (vitamin B2), and folate (vitamin B9) to protect the healthy cells and tissues in the body from external influences, such as sunlight and air pollution.

Special Ingredients
AgeLoss® Hair Support is enriched with a special combination of bioactive substances and natural extracts. A bamboo extract provides 70% silicon (silica), a mineral that occurs naturally in high concentrations in connective tissue and also in the hair. It also contains an extensive blend of extracts from fruits and vegetables, such as berries, kiwi, citrus fruits, and green leafy vegetables. It also contains the sulphur donor MSM (methylsulfonylmethane), the amino acid L-cysteine, a turmeric extract, and apple polyphenols.

Your hair has to deal with stressors on a daily basis, such as the UV rays of sunlight and the heat of a hair dryer. To protect your cells from harmful external influences, such as pollution and sunlight, Men's Ultra Hair® Plus contains the antioxidants vitamin C, riboflavin (vitamin B2), and zinc.

product.title: Ultra-C 2000 mg - 60 Tablets
product.description:
What is Ultra-C 2000 mg?
Ultra-C contains 2,000 mg of vitamin C supplemented by 200 mg of rosehip to increase bioavailability per delayed-release tablet.
What is vitamin C?
Vitamin C is the most important water-soluble antioxidant and protects our body from free radicals (aggressive substances that can damage tissues and cells). Known causes of this are smoking, stress and an unhealthy diet. Antioxidants render these free radicals harmless and help the body stay healthy. Vitamin C has been proven to have a positive effect in many different places and in the most diverse processes of our body:
It contributes to the normal functioning of the immune system, as well as the nervous system, increases iron absorption and contributes to normal collagen formation, as well as to the normal functioning of blood vessels, cartilage and skin.
Vitamin C in our diet
Since our body cannot synthesize vitamin C on its own, we have to absorb it completely through food.
Vitamin C sources are mainly fruits and vegetables as well as their juices and smoothies. Citrus fruits, kiwis, berries, strawberries and cabbages in particular are rich in vitamin C.
Ultra-C 2000 mg as a tablet
Ultra-C 2000 mg of NaturesPlus contains 60 or 90 delayed-release tablets.
More
Vitamin C Products

To maintain healthy cartilage
AgeLoss® Joint Support provides a generous amount of vitamin C from organic gooseberries. This vitamin contributes to normal collagen formation and helps maintain healthy cartilage in the joints. AgeLoss® Joint Support also provides manganese, which supports the production of cartilage and bone tissue.
With glucosamine and chondroitin
Glucosamine and chondroitin are building blocks that occur naturally in the cartilage and synovial fluid of our body. AgeLoss® Women's Multi is a multivitamin specifically designed for women over 50. It contains a carefully formulated combination of vitamins, minerals and bioactive substances that meet the daily nutritional needs of women. Ideal for keeping the body vital and healthy.

Supplemental Vitamin D
By adding vitamin D3, vitamin K2 and calcium, AgeLoss® Women's Multi provides extra support for bones. In addition, vitamin C and selenium contribute to a good immune system and zinc to the regulation of hormonal balance.

Rhodiola rosea
extract. In addition, it provides flavonoids and amino acids in their free form.

product.title: Stabilium® 200 - 30 softgels
product.description: Stabilium® 200 is a specially formulated dietary supplement. It contains Garum Armoricum® fish hydrolysate, vitamin B6, vitamin E and vitamin A. Garum Armoricum® is an extract from the fish Molva dypterygia, found in deep waters off the Armorican peninsula of Brittany. It was used by the ancient Celts of Armorica, Ireland, and by the ancient Romans, as a food supplement to improve resilience to physical and emotional stress. Research confirms that Stabilium® 200 may be useful for coping with stresses from work or personal life, and can support healthy sleep patterns, energy, memory, and mood.

product.title: Sano-Gastril® Digest’ - 36 chewables
product.description:
Many factors can impact our digestive well-being: unbalanced diet, medication use, stress, bad eating habits, etc. Sano-Gastril® Digest' is a unique food supplement obtained by fermentation of soybeans (Glycine maximus L.) by a special strain of lactobacillus: Lactobacillus bulgaricus Lb 51. The scientific history of this ingredient begins in the 1960s with the work of Dr. Ivan Bogdanov. It is now supported by solid scientific and clinical evidence from over 600 people tested in total. Fennel (Foeniculum vulgare Mil.) is used to aid digestion and to help reduce digestive discomforts such as bloating.

Sano-Gastril® Digest' is suitable for people prone to discomfort caused by certain eating habits, overly acidic food, meals eaten too quickly, excess alcohol, coffee or overly spicy dishes.

product.title: Sécuril® Organic - 30 capsules
product.description: Sécuril® is a novel formulation that contains a special type of probiotic bacteria found in food (Propionibacterium freudenreichii), which can simultaneously function as a prebiotic and help rebalance the intestinal flora. Strains selected and deposited at the CNCM of the Pasteur Institute, titrating 5 billion bacteria per capsule.

product.title: Iodoral® 6.25 mg - 90 tablets
product.description: Iodoral® is a tablet form of Lugol solution. One 6.25 mg tablet of Iodoral® supplies an amount of total elemental iodine comparable to half the average daily intake of this essential element by mainland Japanese. Iodine is an essential element. Although its main function is in the production of thyroid hormones by the thyroid gland, other organs in the body have a need for iodine in order to function normally.

product.title: Iodoral® 50 mg - 30 tablets
product.description: Iodine is one of the essential trace elements that our body cannot produce on its own. It is a component of the thyroid hormone thyroxine and is therefore of central importance for the functioning of the metabolism. All human organ systems (especially the nervous system) depend on iodine. Iodine is also important for maintaining body temperature (basal metabolism) and for cell division and growth. In addition, it plays a role in maintaining normal skin (regenerative ability), contributes to normal cognitive function and thus plays an important role in mental movement and activity. It supports normal growth in children. An undersupply of iodine can become noticeable through an enlargement of the thyroid gland as a goiter (goiter). The formulation of the product Iodoral is based on Lugol's solution. Each tablet contains a mixture of iodine (20 mg) and potassium iodide (30 mg).

product.title: Stabilium® 200 - 90 softgels
product.description: Stabilium® 200 is a specially formulated dietary supplement. It contains Garum Armoricum® fish hydrolysate, vitamin B6, vitamin E and vitamin A. Garum Armoricum® is an extract from the fish Molva dypterygia, found in deep waters off the Armorican peninsula of Brittany. It was used by the ancient Celts of Armorica, Ireland, and by the ancient Romans, as a food supplement to improve resilience to physical and emotional stress. Research confirms that Stabilium® 200 may be useful for coping with stresses from work or personal life, and can support healthy sleep patterns, energy, memory, and mood.

product.title: ImmunoMod-A™ - 120 capsules
product.description: ImmunoMod-A™ has been formulated to help balance a healthy inflammatory response, which is necessary to help maintain optimal immune function in the body. It features ParActin®, an extract of the herb Andrographis paniculata, which has been shown to help modulate immune, inflammatory, and oxidative pathways. This product also contains the monosaccharide N-acetyl-D-glucosamine, along with curcumin, a polyphenolic compound extract from the spice turmeric. Both of these compounds help to support a healthy inflammatory response. Together, the ingredients in ImmunoMod-A™ work to support the proper expression of nuclear factor-kappa B and its related downstream cytokines to help maintain a healthy, balanced immune response.

NSK-SD® has two Japanese and three U.S. patents, and is recognized by the JHFA (Japan Health and Nutrition Food Authorization) and JNKA (Japan Nattokinase Association) as authentic nattokinase. product.description: Trizomal™ Glutathione is a breakthrough new approach to glutathione supplementation. It features, for the first time in a liposomal solution, S-acetyl L-glutathione (SAG), combined with reduced glutathione (GSH), and N-acetyl L-cysteine (NAC). This formulation utilizes three ways to support glutathione—intracellular with SAG, intracellular biosynthesis with NAC, and extra/intracellular (systemic) support with GSH. Moreover, the liposomal S-acetyl L-glutathione in this formula provides a double layer (acetylation + liposomes) of protection to the glutathione molecule, further supporting its intracellular bioavailability.

product.title: PhytoCort® - 120 capsules
product.description: PhytoCort® is a combination of reishi (Ganoderma lucidum), shrubby sophora (Sophora flavescens), Chinese licorice (Glycyrrhiza uralensis), and noni (Morinda citrifolia).

product.title: Magnesium Malate - 240 capsules
product.description:
Magnesium is an essential mineral that serves as an enzyme cofactor for over three hundred biochemical
reactions in the body. The need for magnesium throughout the body is reflected in the fact that the adult
human body contains approximately 25 grams of magnesium, divided among the skeleton, muscle tissue,
blood, and other areas.
Magnesium malate is a form of magnesium bound to malic acid, which is a compound found naturally
in fruits and vegetables, and is responsible for the tart flavor of rhubarb and green apples. Magnesium is a
required cofactor for enzymes that harness energy from carbohydrates, while malic acid is an intermediary of
the complex process that generates energy from all fuel sources, including carbohydrates, fats, and ketones.
Therefore, magnesium malate may be especially beneficial for individuals who experience occasional low
energy and fatigue.
Magnesium may also support:
• Cardiovascular function: Owing to its role in muscle contraction and relaxation, and nerve conduction,
magnesium may help support healthy blood pressure levels and cardiovascular function.
• Healthy carbohydrate tolerance: Magnesium is indispensable for converting carbohydrate (glucose) to
energy, and is also required for proper functioning of the insulin receptor. Individuals who experience
occasional issues related to blood glucose levels and carbohydrate tolerance may benefit from
supplemental magnesium.
• Bone health: Sixty percent of the magnesium in the human body is found in the skeleton. Magnesium
is an essential element of the physical structure of bone tissue. Supplementing with calcium alone often
does not have the desired effect of strengthening bones; maintenance of healthy bones requires adequate
magnesium, along with protein and other mineral cofactors.
Recommended Use: As a dietary supplement, take two capsules per day with meals, or as directed by your
health care practitioner.

product.title: Protein Shake Gold Vanilla - 468 g powder
product.description: Protein is the most important structural element of all body cells, especially muscle cells. Through the digestive process, dietary proteins are broken down into individual amino acids, which are then used to form nucleic acids, enzymes, hormones, neurotransmitters, and blood cells, as well as cell repair, nervous and immune systems. Animal protein comes mainly from meat, eggs or milk, while vegetable protein comes from rice, soy or legumes such as peas. Animal protein usually provides a higher quality profile of amino acids. However, this difference can be compensated for by combining selected plant-based proteins. One serving of Protein Shake Gold Vanilla provides 12 g of soy-free GOLD standard protein from GMO-free chia (Salvia hispanica), rice, peas and flax together with a broad spectrum of vitamins, minerals and other vital substances. This makes it a complete, fat-free meal replacement with 94 calories.

product.title: DIM Vitex - 120 capsules
product.description: Updated Formula!BioResponse DIM®, a stable, bioavailable form of diindolylmethane (DIM), combined with Vitex standardized extract, bioactive vitamin B6, magnesium, and chromium.BioResponse DIM® is a proprietary, enhanced bioavailability complex containing diindolylmethane licensed from BioResponse, L.L.C., Boulder, Colorado.

product.title: META-CARE® Basic 3 - 90 capsules
product.description: META-CARE® Basic 3 contains the base-forming minerals potassium, magnesium and calcium, combined with a water-soluble extract of wild marjoram. Potassium and magnesium play a significant role in the sequence of muscle contraction and relaxation and are therefore particularly important for the heart muscle. In addition, potassium makes a valuable contribution to maintaining normal blood pressure and magnesium helps to maintain a balanced electrolyte metabolism. Calcium has, in addition to other important functions, an influence on the digestive enzymes and supports a normal energy metabolism.

product.title: Herbal Actives Milk Thistle Extended Release - 30 tablets
product.description: Milk Thistle provides 500 mg of a standardised extract from the seeds of milk thistle (Silybum marianum) with 80% (400 mg) silymarin. In extended release tablets for superior absorption. Milk thistle has long been used in European herbalism to promote healthy liver function.

product.title: Iron - 90 tablets
product.description:
What is iron? Iron is one of the essential trace elements that our body cannot produce on its own. It is involved in many processes in the human organism, including the transport of oxygen as a component of the red blood pigment haemoglobin and the storage of oxygen in the muscles. In addition, iron is necessary for blood formation as well as for the functioning of various enzymes and many metabolic processes. It helps to release energy from fat, carbohydrates, and protein, reduces energy deficiency, and also contributes to normal cell division. Children need iron for brain development. An undersupply of iron can occur, among other things, due to blood loss (menstruation) or phases of increased demand, e.g. pregnancy, children in the growth phase.

Iron in our food Iron is particularly found in animal products such as meat and fish. Animal foods contain divalent iron, which can be better utilized by the body than plant-based, trivalent iron. Nevertheless, plant-based foods such as legumes, whole grains, spinach, peas, and salsify also contribute to meeting iron requirements. Vitamin C can promote the absorption of iron. It is therefore recommended to consume foods rich in vitamin C such as orange juice, peppers, or broccoli at the same time.

Iron as a supplement NaturesPlus' Iron contains 20 mg of bioavailable iron per tablet. One pack provides 90 tablets or 180 tablets. Hint: Food supplements are not intended to be a substitute for a balanced and varied diet.

product.title: Twice Daily Multi™ - 60 capsules
product.description: Twice Daily Multi™ contains optimal amounts of many nutrients not easily obtained in most diets. It uses higher quality ingredients than most multivitamins, including vitamin E Isomers as DeltaGold® tocotrienols, a highly bioavailable form of folate, and true amino acid chelate minerals for optimal tolerance and absorption. These exceptional ingredients are combined in an up-to-date, science-based formulation to create a truly superior multivitamin with just two capsules per day.

product.title: PharmaGABA® - 60 chewables
product.description: PharmaGABA® is naturally sourced, bioidentical gamma-aminobutyric acid (GABA). It is made by a process in which the amino acid of glutamic acid (glutamate) is fermented using Lactobacillus hilgardii, the beneficial bacteria that is also used to ferment many foods including the vegetables in kimchi, the famous Korean dish. PharmaGABA® provides 200 mg of GABA per serving (2 tablets). The chewable tablet delivery allows for rapid and efficient absorption and assimilation. GABA is a naturally occurring amino acid in the brain, and it is a major inhibitory neurotransmitter in the central nervous system. GABA serves as a critical calming agent for the body, helping to combat occasional stress and anxiety.

product.title: ProbioMed™ 100 - 30 capsules
product.description: ProbioMed™ 100 is a highly potent, shelf-stable, dairy-free probiotic formulation containing 100 billion colony-forming units (CFUs) per serving. It consists of 10 of the most highly researched probiotic strains, with each strain and specific CFU count being fully disclosed. These are robust strains that are capable of surviving the harsh journey to the intestines and are able to attach to the intestinal walls, where they can grow and function effectively to support gastrointestinal health. The survivability of the strains is further assisted by delayed-release technology and unique moisture-resistant, desiccant-lined packaging. This novel packaging removes the need for refrigeration, making ProbioMed™ 100 convenient for travelers and anyone on the go.

product.title: Liposomal NeuroCalm™ - 50 mL liposomal
product.description: Liposomal NeuroCalm™ is a unique blend of gamma-aminobutyric acid (GABA) and L-theanine to support mental calm and a healthy response to stress. The ingredients are formulated with liposomal technology to offer superior absorption and bioavailability. Each serving of this formula provides 250 mg of GABA and 100 mg of L-theanine.

product.title: Sensitol™ - 120 capsules
product.description:
Sensitol™ is a unique formulation comprised of two naturally occurring forms of the nutrient inositol—
myo-inositol (MI) and D-chiro-inositol (DCI)—along with alpha lipoic acid. It is designed to support
healthy insulin signaling, cellular metabolism and female hormone balance.*
Once considered a member of the B vitamin family, inositol was deemed “non-essential” when it was
discovered that the human body can make inositol from glucose. However, as is the case for many other
nutrients, there are certain situations that may benefit from supplementing with inositol at levels above
that which the body typically produces.
Inositol occurs naturally in a variety of foods—fruit, in
particular—but due to being bound to other compounds, it
is not as bioavailable in other foods that would otherwise
be good sources, such as grains and beans. Inositol occurs
naturally in nine different forms (called isomers). The MI
and DCI isomers have been recognized to be the most
predominant and have important functions in human
physiology, such as mediating normal cell signaling
from insulin and from other hormones, such as thyroid
hormones and sex hormones (for example, estrogen).
Several aspects of our modern diets and lifestyles
contribute to elevated insulin levels in susceptible individuals. And while insulin is best known for its
role in lowering blood sugar after meals (particularly ones containing carbohydrate), that is only one of
many functions insulin performs. Insulin is an essential hormone with a multitude of crucial roles, but it’s
possible to get “too much of a good thing.” The key is finding, and maintaining, the proper balance.
The forms of inositol in Sensitol™ may help the body respond better to insulin, thus having a beneficial
effect on metabolic and hormonal processes that are influenced by healthy insulin signaling.* Inositol is
also an important factor for balancing female hormones by supporting healthy liver function.* The liver is
a key organ in the detoxification and clearance of excess hormones, such as estrogen and testosterone,
so proper support for these pathways may facilitate healthy hormone levels.*
This product also contains alpha-lipoic acid, a compound that influences sensitivity to insulin,
contributes to healthy blood sugar levels, and supports the conversion of glucose (primarily from
carbohydrate) into energy.*
Recommended Use: As a dietary supplement, take two capsules two times per day, or as directed by
your health care practitioner.

product.title: Source of Life® Multivitamin - 180 mini-tablets
product.description: You need a great multivitamin to live your best life. That means you want Source of Life Mini-Tabs from NaturesPlus—whole food nutrition done right. This multivitamin supports energy production in an easy-to-take mini form.

product.title: Vessel Forte™ - 120 capsules
product.description:
Vessel Forte™ is a synergistic combination of natural extracts that have been extensively researched for their benefits in supporting the strength, elasticity, and health of blood vessels, and optimizing blood circulation. Many Americans struggle with poor circulation and compromised vessel health. Contributing factors include pregnancy, obesity (additional weight adds increased pressure on the body), hormonal changes, menopause, poor diet, lack of exercise, and prolonged sitting or standing. Vessel Forte™ also assists in ensuring healthy blood and lymph circulation by providing antioxidants, which protect vessels from damaging free radicals. It also aids the body in mounting a normal inflammatory response that will not damage vessels or circulatory health.

Highlights of Vessel Forte™:
Sweet Orange Extract (Citrus sinensis) – a naturally occurring compound from citrus rinds, which is rich in bioflavonoids and acts as a vessel-protecting agent. It supports a healthy inflammatory response when vessels are under pressure and preserves healthy vessel tone.
Horse Chestnut Extract – contains a unique compound that protects the structural integrity of the smallest blood vessels, known as capillaries. These vessels are only one cell layer thick and are involved in the critical exchange of oxygen and nutrients between blood and body tissues.
Vitamin C – an important nutrient in collagen production and vessel integrity. Collagen is one of the key structural proteins in blood vessels and other connective tissues; it helps to maintain vessel strength and elasticity.
Grape Seed Extract – a source of potent antioxidants that help improve blood circulation by strengthening capillaries, arteries, and veins. Its ability to bond with collagen suggests that grape seed extract is beneficial in promoting skin health, cell health, elasticity, and flexibility.
Gotu Kola (Centella asiatica) – promotes collagen synthesis and helps support vessel wall strength and elasticity. It also helps to maintain healthy circulation by strengthening the integrity of capillary walls so excess fluid does not leak into surrounding tissues and cause occasional swelling.
Quercetin – a flavonoid antioxidant found abundantly in red onion, capers, and leafy green culinary herbs that supports the maintenance of healthy blood vessels and normal blood viscosity (thickness).

Recommended Use: As a dietary supplement, take four capsules per day, or as directed by your health care practitioner.

product.title: Acetyl Glutathione - 20 g powder
product.description:
Acetyl Glutathione is an improved form of glutathione that remains stable when taken orally.

Because of its form as an acetyl-ester it is easily absorbed into the cells. Glutathione appears in high concentrations in the cells and is important for the detoxification processes. Intracellular acetyl glutathione helps maintain the redox-balance, which protects oxidative stress from free radicals. The capacity to ”recycle” vitamin E and C shows how the redox-balance is being maintained, and its ability to recycle it.

Acetyl Glutathione Powder provides 20 grams of pure powder for 20 portions of 1 gram, making it ideal for high individual dosages. Vitaplex Acetyl Glutathione is a pure product of high pharmaceutical quality with no artificial additives.

The mouth, nose and throat are the first entry points for foreign germs. However, we have an important first defence system integrated in our mouth: the oral microbiome, also known as the oral flora or oral microbiome. These are microorganisms that occur naturally in the oral cavity, mainly beneficial bacteria that live on the oral mucous membranes.

product.title: PaleoFiber® RS - 300 g powder

RS is a type of starch that is resistant to digestion, as enzymes in the gastrointestinal (GI) tract are inactive against it. Once RS reaches the large intestine, it is fermented into short-chain fatty acids, which are used as fuel for both beneficial microbes and enterocytes of the GI tract. PaleoFiber® RS benefits GI health through its ability to support microbial balance and proper intestinal permeability and integrity. Additionally, this formula may help support optimal blood sugar and insulin metabolism, normal appetite, and cardiovascular health.

product.title: GPC Liquid - 59 mL liquid
product.description:
Glycerophosphocholine (GPC) is a source of choline, which is a building block for critical compounds
in the body—in particular, acetylcholine and phosphatidylcholine. Acetylcholine is a neurotransmitter
that plays crucial roles in memory, learning, muscle coordination and movement, and both aspects of
the nervous system: the sympathetic nervous system (“fight or flight”) and parasympathetic nervous
system (“rest and digest”). Phosphatidylcholine is an essential component of all cell membranes,
including neurons in the brain as well as the myelin coating that surrounds and protects neurons.
Choline is also a major constituent of lung surfactant, a naturally produced compound needed for
healthy lung function.
Choline is required for the healthy metabolism of fats, especially with regard to the role of the liver
in processing fats and making the proper components (called lipoprotein particles) that transport
cholesterol and fat-soluble nutrients throughout the bloodstream. A healthy supply of choline allows
fats to be processed properly as opposed to accumulating in the liver.
The human body synthesizes choline internally, but this production is relatively limited and may not
always be adequate to meet an individual’s needs, particularly if they may have an increased demand
for choline, such as if requiring support for memory and cognition, neurological function, balanced
moods, and supporting overall physical and mental vitality during aging. For these reasons, choline is
considered an essential nutrient. Choline is found in egg yolks, liver, beef, peanuts, broccoli, cauliflower
and other foods of both animal and vegetable origin, but supplemental amounts, as provided by GPC,
may be warranted for some individuals. Animal foods tend to be more concentrated sources of choline
than plant foods, and heavy alcohol consumption increases the need for choline.
Owing to the role of choline in neuron structure and function, as well as in synthesis of acetylcholine
and other neurotransmitters, GPC may help support brain structure and function and nervous system
function.* The chemical structure of GPC makes it more effective for supporting the body’s levels of
choline than choline or phosphatidylcholine from foods.
Our GPC is available in liquid and capsule form. GPC has a naturally delicious, sweet taste on its own, so
no additional sweeteners are used in the liquid form.
Recommended Use
GPC Capsules: As a dietary supplement, take one capsule per day, or as directed by your health
care practitioner.
GPC Liquid: As a dietary supplement, take 2 mL (approx. 2 droppers full) per day, or as directed by
your health care practitioner.

product.title: Hepatatone Plus™ - 120 capsules

product.title: 5-HTP Synergy™ - 90 capsules
product.description:
5-HTP Synergy™ combines 5-hydroxytryptophan (5-HTP) and
pyridoxal-5-phosphate (the activated form of vitamin B6) to
help support healthy serotonin levels and general
neurotransmitter function. This synergistic formula is designed
to help the body maintain healthy sleep patterns, balanced
moods, and a normalized appetite. 5-HTP readily enters the
blood brain barrier and combines with vitamin B6 during
its conversion to serotonin. Therefore, 5-HTP Synergy™ is
the perfect blend for optimizing serotonin production and
neurotransmitter function.*
Why is Serotonin Important?
Serotonin is one of the most abundant neurotransmitters in
the brain and is often referred to as the “feel good hormone”
because of its role in sleep, mood, mental outlook, appetite,
body temperature, sexual behavior, and the body’s natural pain
response. Today’s hectic, stressful lifestyles can contribute to a
reduction in serotonin levels, which may affect these factors.
Serotonin, itself, does not cross the blood brain barrier; it is synthesized in the brain from its individual
components. Therefore, supplementing directly with serotonin would be ineffective for raising levels
in the brain, but providing its precursors, such as 5-HTP and vitamin B6, can help maintain healthy
serotonin levels.
Additional Highlights*
• 5-HTP may support healthy weight management, as it helps to balance appetite and minimize
cravings for carbohydrates.
• 5-HTP may be beneficial for aiding individuals in maintaining a low-glycemic or low-carbohydrate diet
by supporting balanced blood sugar levels.
• 5-HTP is highly absorbable and unaffected by the presence of other amino acids, meaning it can be
taken conveniently with food, without impacting its effectiveness.
• 5-HTP is also used by the body to produce other neurotransmitters and brain chemicals such
as melatonin, dopamine, norepinephrine, and beta-endorphin, comprehensively supporting
neurotransmitter function, mental health, and a positive mental outlook.
Recommended Use: As a dietary supplement, take one capsule per day, or as directed by your health
care practitioner.

product.title: Niacin - 90 tablets
product.description:
What is niacin?
Niacin belongs to the group of water-soluble B vitamins. The term niacin does not basically refer to a single vitamin, but stands for nicotinic acid and nicotinamide as well as their compounds. In contrast to many other vitamins, the human body also produces niacin itself: in the liver from the amino acid tryptophan. As a component of important coenzymes, niacin is involved in many reactions in all cells of the body. These include, for example, processes of cell division, the formation and breakdown of carbohydrates, amino acids and fatty acids, and the immune response. Niacin also promotes energy metabolism, contributes to mental resilience, brain and nerve functions, is involved in learning and helps to nourish the skin from the inside out.

Vitamin B3 in the diet
Vitamin B3 is found in meat, fish, whole grains, nuts, seeds, vegetables and potatoes.

Vitamin B3 as a tablet
Niacin from NaturesPlus contains 90 tablets.

That is important
Since niacin stimulates blood circulation, it can temporarily cause a severe but harmless red discoloration of the skin (a so-called flush). Alternatively, niacinamide can be used, which does not trigger this flush.
Hint:
Food supplements are not intended to be a substitute for a balanced and varied diet.

With glucosamine and chondroitin
Glucosamine and chondroitin are substances that occur naturally in our body. Cartilage and synovial fluid in particular contain large amounts of these building materials. Under normal circumstances, the body can synthesize these substances on its own. To increase the absorption of these substances, a supplement can have a supportive effect.

Rx-Joint® Tablets

product.title: HemeVite Plus™ - 90 capsules
product.description: HemeVite Plus supports hemoglobin synthesis by providing ferrous bisglycinate chelate (iron).
